  1880→      
  1881→      // Handle post-analysis question responses
  1882→      if (window.waitingForQuestionResponse) {
  1883→        // Still process the question locally
  1884→        const questionHandled = handleQuestionResponse(text);
  1885→        
  1886→        // Also send to backend to save in history and get LLM response
  1887→        setLoading(true);
  1888→        try {
  1889→          const res = await fetch('/api/message', {
  1890→            method: 'POST',
  1891→            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  1892→            body: JSON.stringify({ message: text })
  1893→          });
  1894→          const data = await res.json();
  1895→          
  1896→          if (data.error) {
  1897→            console.error('Backend error saving question response:', data.error);
  1898→          } else if (data.response && !questionHandled) {
  1899→            // Display backend response only if question wasn't handled locally
  1900→            // This allows LLM to acknowledge or provide feedback
  1901→            appendMessage('assistant', data.response);
  1902→          }
  1903→        } catch (error) {
  1904→          console.error('=== QUESTION RESPONSE SAVE ERROR ===');
  1905→          console.error('Error type:', error.name);
  1906→          console.error('Error message:', error.message);
  1907→          console.error('Error stack:', error.stack);
  1908→          console.error('Question text:', text);
  1909→          console.error('Full error:', error);
  1910→          console.error('===================================');
  1911→        }
  1912→        setLoading(false);
  1913→        
  1914→        if (questionHandled) {
  1915→          return;
  1916→        }
  1917→      }
  1918→      
  1919→      // Handle proceed command
  1920→      if (text.toLowerCase() === 'proceed') {
  1921→        if (window.pendingRecommendations) {
  1922→          await showTableBasedReview();
  1923→        } else {
  1924→          // Generate customizations
  1925→          await sendAction('recommend_customizations');
  1926→        }
  1927→        return;
  1928→      }
  1929→      
  1930→      setLoading(true);
  1931→
  1932→      try {
  1933→        const res = await fetch('/api/message', {
  1934→          method: 'POST',
  1935→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  1936→          body: JSON.stringify({ message: text })
  1937→        });
  1938→        const data = await res.json();
  1939→        
  1940→        if (data.error) {
  1941→          // Filter out error messages that are just CV data echoes
  1942→          const errorMsg = data.error.toString();
  1943→          if (errorMsg.includes('personal_info') || 
  1944→              errorMsg.includes('experience":') ||
  1945→              errorMsg.includes('"name":') ||
  1946→              errorMsg.match(/^\s*["'{]/)) {
  1947→            console.warn('Backend error was CV data echo, suppressing:', errorMsg);
  1948→          } else {
  1949→            appendMessage('system', 'Error: ' + errorMsg);
  1950→            console.error('Server error:', data.error);
  1951→          }
  1952→        } else if (data.response) {
  1953→          try {
  1954→            // Remove any CV data echoes that the LLM might include
  1955→            let cleanResponse = data.response;
  1956→            
  1957→            // Check if response contains customization JSON (even if mixed with text)
  1958→            const jsonMatch = cleanResponse.match(/\{[\s\S]*?"recommended_experiences"[\s\S]*?\}/);
  1959→            if (jsonMatch) {
  1960→              // Extract just the text part before JSON
  1961→              const textBeforeJson = cleanResponse.substring(0, jsonMatch.index).trim();
  1962→              if (textBeforeJson && textBeforeJson.length > 0 && !textBeforeJson.includes('{"action":')) {
  1963→                // Filter out CV data echoes (lines starting with quotes or containing personal_info)
  1964→                const filteredLines = textBeforeJson.split('\n')
  1965→                  .filter(line => {
  1966→                    const trimmed = line.trim();
  1967→                    return trimmed.length > 0 && 
  1968→                           !trimmed.startsWith('"') && 
  1969→                           !trimmed.includes('personal_info') &&
  1970→                           !trimmed.includes('experience') &&
  1971→                           !trimmed.includes('}: {');
  1972→                  })
  1973→                  .join('\n');
  1974→                
  1975→                if (filteredLines.trim().length > 0) {
  1976→                  appendMessage('assistant', filteredLines);
  1977→                }
  1978→              }
  1979→              // Handle the customization JSON
  1980→              await handleCustomizationResponse(jsonMatch[0]);
  1981→            } else {
  1982→              // Regular conversation - just display as text, but filter CV data echoes
  1983→              const filteredResponse = cleanResponse.split('\n')
  1984→                .filter(line => {
  1985→                  const trimmed = line.trim();
  1986→                  return trimmed.length > 0 && 
  1987→                         !trimmed.startsWith('"') && 
  1988→                         !trimmed.includes('personal_info') &&
  1989→                         !trimmed.includes('experience":') &&
  1990→                         !trimmed.includes('education":') &&
  1991→                         !trimmed.includes('skills":') &&
  1992→                         !trimmed.includes('publications":') &&
  1993→                         !trimmed.match(/^\s*"[a-z_]+":\s*[{\[]/) &&
  1994→                         !trimmed.match(/^\s*\{[\s\S]*"[a-z_]+"/); // Don't show JSON objects
  1995→                })
  1996→                .join('\n');
  1997→              
  1998→              if (filteredResponse.trim().length > 0) {
  1999→                appendMessage('assistant', filteredResponse);
  2000→              } else {
  2001→                // LLM returned only CV data echoes, nothing meaningful to show
  2002→                console.warn('LLM response contained only CV data echoes, nothing to display');
  2003→              }
  2004→            }
  2005→          } catch (error) {
  2006→            console.error('Error processing message response:', error);
  2007→            console.error('Raw response:', data.response);
  2008→            appendMessage('system', `⚠️ I encountered an issue processing that response: ${error.message}. The conversation has been saved.`);
  2009→          }
  2010→        }
  2011→      } catch (error) {
  2012→        console.error('=== MESSAGE ERROR ===');
  2013→        console.error('Error type:', error.name);
  2014→        console.error('Error message:', error.message);
  2015→        console.error('Error stack:', error.stack);
  2016→        console.error('User input:', text);
  2017→        console.error('Full error:', error);
  2018→        console.error('===================');
  2019→        if (error instanceof TypeError || error.name === 'AbortError') {
  2020→          appendMessage('system', `⚠️ Cannot reach the server — is it still running? (${error.message})`);
  2021→        } else if (error instanceof SyntaxError) {
  2022→          appendMessage('system', `⚠️ The server returned an unexpected response: ${error.message}`);
  2023→        } else {
  2024→          appendMessage('system', '⚠️ ' + error.message);
  2025→        }
  2026→      }
  2027→      
  2028→      setLoading(false);
  2029→      await fetchStatus();
  2030→    }
  2031→
  2032→    async function analyzeJob() {
  2033→      if (isLoading) return;
  2034→      
  2035→      const loadingMsg = appendLoadingMessage('Analyzing job description...');
  2036→      setLoading(true);
  2037→      
  2038→      try {
  2039→        const res = await fetch('/api/action', {
  2040→          method: 'POST',
  2041→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  2042→          body: JSON.stringify({ action: 'analyze_job' })
  2043→        });
  2044→        const data = await res.json();
  2045→        
  2046→        removeLoadingMessage(loadingMsg);
  2047→        
  2048→        if (data.error) {
  2049→          appendMessage('system', 'Error: ' + data.error);
  2050→        } else {
  2051→          appendFormattedAnalysis(data.result);
  2052→          // Switch to analysis tab to show results
  2053→          switchTab('analysis');
  2054→          populateAnalysisTab(data.result);
  2055→
  2056→          // Await post-analysis questions while still loading to prevent
  2057→          // user input race conditions during the LLM question-generation call.
  2058→          await askPostAnalysisQuestions(data.result);
  2059→        }
  2060→      } catch (error) {
  2061→        console.error('=== ANALYZE JOB ERROR ===');
  2062→        console.error('Error type:', error.name);
  2063→        console.error('Error message:', error.message);
  2064→        console.error('Error stack:', error.stack);
  2065→        console.error('Full error:', error);
  2066→        console.error('========================');
  2067→        removeLoadingMessage(loadingMsg);
  2068→        appendMessage('system', 'Error: ' + error.message);
  2069→      }
  2070→
  2071→      setLoading(false);
  2072→      await fetchStatus();
  2073→    }
  2074→
  2075→    function getExperienceRecommendation(expId, data) {
  2076→      // Extract recommendation level from LLM response
  2077→      if (data.experience_recommendations && Array.isArray(data.experience_recommendations)) {
  2078→        const rec = data.experience_recommendations.find(r => r.id === expId || r.experience_id === expId);
  2079→        if (rec && rec.recommendation) {
  2080→          return rec.recommendation; // Should be: "Emphasize", "Include", "De-emphasize", or "Omit"
  2081→        }
  2082→      }
  2083→      
  2084→      // Fallback: check if in emphasize/deemphasize/omit arrays
  2085→      if (data.recommended_experiences && data.recommended_experiences.includes(expId)) {
  2086→        return "Emphasize";
  2087→      }
  2088→      if (data.deemphasized_experiences && data.deemphasized_experiences.includes(expId)) {
  2089→        return "De-emphasize";
  2090→      }
  2091→      if (data.omitted_experiences && data.omitted_experiences.includes(expId)) {
  2092→        return "Omit";
  2093→      }
  2094→      
  2095→      return "Include"; // Default
  2096→    }
  2097→
  2098→    function getConfidenceLevel(expId, data) {
  2099→      // Extract confidence level from LLM response
  2100→      if (data.experience_recommendations && Array.isArray(data.experience_recommendations)) {
  2101→        const rec = data.experience_recommendations.find(r => r.id === expId || r.experience_id === expId);
  2102→        if (rec && rec.confidence) {
  2103→          const conf = rec.confidence.toLowerCase();
  2104→          if (conf.includes('very high')) {
  2105→            return { level: 'very-high', text: 'Very High Confidence' };
  2106→          } else if (conf.includes('high')) {
  2107→            return { level: 'high', text: 'High Confidence' };
  2108→          } else if (conf.includes('medium')) {
  2109→            return { level: 'medium', text: 'Medium Confidence' };
  2110→          } else if (conf.includes('low') && !conf.includes('very')) {
  2111→            return { level: 'low', text: 'Low Confidence' };
  2112→          } else if (conf.includes('very low')) {
  2113→            return { level: 'very-low', text: 'Very Low Confidence' };
  2114→          }
  2115→        }
  2116→      }
  2117→      
  2118→      // Fallback to medium confidence if not specified
  2119→      return { level: 'medium', text: 'Medium Confidence' };
  2120→    }
  2121→
  2122→    function getExperienceReasoning(expId, data) {
  2123→      // Extract reasoning from LLM response
  2124→      if (data.experience_recommendations && Array.isArray(data.experience_recommendations)) {
  2125→        const rec = data.experience_recommendations.find(r => r.id === expId || r.experience_id === expId);
  2126→        if (rec && rec.reasoning) {
  2127→          return rec.reasoning;
  2128→        }
  2129→      }
  2130→      
  2131→      // Fallback reasoning if not provided
  2132→      return "This experience was selected based on its relevance to the position requirements.";
  2133→    }
  2134→
  2135→    function getSkillRecommendation(skill, data) {
  2136→      // Extract recommendation level from LLM response
  2137→      if (data.skill_recommendations && Array.isArray(data.skill_recommendations)) {
  2138→        const rec = data.skill_recommendations.find(r => r.skill === skill || r.name === skill);
  2139→        if (rec && rec.recommendation) {
  2140→          return rec.recommendation; // Should be: "Emphasize", "Include", "De-emphasize", or "Omit"
  2141→        }
  2142→      }
  2143→      
  2144→      // Fallback: check if in recommended_skills array
  2145→      if (data.recommended_skills && data.recommended_skills.includes(skill)) {
  2146→        return "Include";
  2147→      }
  2148→      
  2149→      return "Omit"; // Default for skills not mentioned
  2150→    }
  2151→
  2152→    function getSkillConfidence(skill, data) {
  2153→      // Extract confidence level from LLM response for skills
  2154→      if (data.skill_recommendations && Array.isArray(data.skill_recommendations)) {
  2155→        const rec = data.skill_recommendations.find(r => r.skill === skill || r.name === skill);
  2156→        if (rec && rec.confidence) {
  2157→          const conf = rec.confidence.toLowerCase();
  2158→          if (conf.includes('very high')) {
  2159→            return { level: 'very-high', text: 'Very High Confidence' };
  2160→          } else if (conf.includes('high')) {
  2161→            return { level: 'high', text: 'High Confidence' };
  2162→          } else if (conf.includes('medium')) {
  2163→            return { level: 'medium', text: 'Medium Confidence' };
  2164→          } else if (conf.includes('low') && !conf.includes('very')) {
  2165→            return { level: 'low', text: 'Low Confidence' };
  2166→          } else if (conf.includes('very low')) {
  2167→            return { level: 'very-low', text: 'Very Low Confidence' };
  2168→          }
  2169→        }
  2170→      }
  2171→      
  2172→      // Fallback: if in recommended_skills, give medium confidence
  2173→      if (data.recommended_skills && data.recommended_skills.includes(skill)) {
  2174→        return { level: 'medium', text: 'Medium Confidence' };
  2175→      }
  2176→      
  2177→      return { level: 'low', text: 'Low Confidence' };
  2178→    }
  2179→
  2180→    function getSkillReasoning(skill, data) {
  2181→      // Extract reasoning from LLM response for skills
  2182→      if (data.skill_recommendations && Array.isArray(data.skill_recommendations)) {
  2183→        const rec = data.skill_recommendations.find(r => r.skill === skill || r.name === skill);
  2184→        if (rec && rec.reasoning) {
  2185→          return rec.reasoning;
  2186→        }
  2187→      }
  2188→      
  2189→      // Fallback reasoning
  2190→      if (data.recommended_skills && data.recommended_skills.includes(skill)) {
  2191→        return "This skill was identified as relevant to the position requirements.";
  2192→      }
  2193→      return "This skill was not specifically mentioned in the job requirements.";
  2194→      return reasonings[Math.floor(Math.random() * reasonings.length)];
  2195→    }
  2196→
  2197→    function buildFallbackPostAnalysisQuestions(data) {
  2198→      const questions = [];
  2199→
  2200→      if (data.role_level) {
  2201→        questions.push({
  2202→          question: `This role appears to be at ${data.role_level} level. Should I emphasize your most senior experiences or include a broader range to show career progression?`,
  2203→          type: 'experience_level',
  2204→          choices: ['Emphasize most senior', 'Broader career progression', 'Let you decide based on analysis'],
  2205→        });
  2206→      }
  2207→
  2208→      if (data.required_skills && data.required_skills.some(skill =>
  2209→          skill.toLowerCase().includes('leadership') ||
  2210→          skill.toLowerCase().includes('management') ||
  2211→          skill.toLowerCase().includes('team'))) {
  2212→        questions.push({
  2213→          question: 'This role has leadership components. Would you prefer me to emphasize your management experience or focus more on your technical contributions?',
  2214→          type: 'leadership_focus',
  2215→          choices: ['Emphasize management', 'Focus on technical', 'Balance both equally'],
  2216→        });
  2217→      }
  2218→
  2219→      if (data.domain) {
  2220→        questions.push({
  2221→          question: `The role is in ${data.domain}. Do you have particular projects or achievements in this domain that you'd like me to highlight?`,
  2222→          type: 'domain_expertise',
  2223→          choices: ['Highlight domain-specific achievements', 'Use all available experience', 'Prioritize most recent work'],
  2224→        });
  2225→      }
  2226→
  2227→      if (data.company) {
  2228→        questions.push({
  2229→          question: `For ${data.company}, would you like me to tailor emphasis toward their culture and values? If so, what should I prioritize?`,
  2230→          type: 'company_culture',
  2231→          choices: ['Research-driven / academic', 'Industry / commercial impact', 'Innovation / startup', 'Use cultural indicators from job description'],
  2232→        });
  2233→      }
  2234→
  2235→      return questions;
  2236→    }
  2237→
  2238→    async function persistPostAnalysisState() {
  2239→      try {
  2240→        if (!Array.isArray(window.postAnalysisQuestions)) {
  2241→          window.postAnalysisQuestions = [];
  2242→        }
  2243→        if (!window.questionAnswers || typeof window.questionAnswers !== 'object') {
  2244→          window.questionAnswers = {};
  2245→        }
  2246→
  2247→        await fetch('/api/post-analysis-responses', {
  2248→          method: 'POST',
  2249→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  2250→          body: JSON.stringify({
  2251→            questions: window.postAnalysisQuestions,
  2252→            answers: window.questionAnswers
  2253→          })
  2254→        });
  2255→      } catch (error) {
  2256→        console.warn('Failed to persist post-analysis state:', error);
  2257→      }
  2258→    }
  2259→
  2260→    async function askPostAnalysisQuestions(analysisResult) {
  2261→      try {
  2262→        const cleanResult = cleanJsonResponse(analysisResult);
  2263→        const data = typeof cleanResult === 'string' ? JSON.parse(cleanResult) : cleanResult;
  2264→
  2265→        window.postAnalysisQuestions = [];
  2266→
  2267→        try {
  2268→          const res = await fetch('/api/post-analysis-questions', {
  2269→            method: 'POST',
  2270→            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  2271→            body: JSON.stringify({ analysis: data })
  2272→          });
  2273→
  2274→          if (res.ok) {
  2275→            const payload = await res.json();
  2276→            if (Array.isArray(payload.questions)) {
  2277→              window.postAnalysisQuestions = payload.questions
  2278→                .filter(q => q && typeof q.question === 'string' && q.question.trim())
  2279→                .map(q => ({
  2280→                  question: q.question.trim(),
  2281→                  type: (q.type || 'clarification').toString(),
  2282→                  choices: Array.isArray(q.choices) ? q.choices : [],
  2283→                }));
  2284→            }
  2285→          }
  2286→        } catch (apiError) {
  2287→          console.warn('Failed to fetch LLM-generated post-analysis questions:', apiError);
  2288→        }
  2289→
  2290→        if (window.postAnalysisQuestions.length === 0) {
  2291→          window.postAnalysisQuestions = buildFallbackPostAnalysisQuestions(data);
  2292→        }
  2293→
  2294→        window.questionAnswers = {};
  2295→        await persistPostAnalysisState();
  2296→
  2297→        if (window.postAnalysisQuestions.length > 0) {
  2298→          renderQuestionsPanel();
  2299→        } else {
  2300→          appendMessage('assistant', 'Analysis complete! Click "Recommend Customizations" when ready.');
  2301→        }
  2302→      } catch (e) {
  2303→        console.error('Error parsing analysis for questions:', e);
  2304→        appendMessage('assistant', 'Analysis complete! Click "Recommend Customizations" when ready.');
  2305→      }
  2306→    }
  2307→
  2308→    // Renders all clarifying questions as a panel at the bottom of the analysis tab.
  2309→    // Each question gets chip buttons + an always-visible text area.
  2310→    function renderQuestionsPanel() {
  2311→      const qs = window.postAnalysisQuestions || [];
  2312→      if (qs.length === 0) return;
  2313→
  2314→      const content = document.getElementById('document-content');
  2315→      if (!content) return;
  2316→
  2317→      // Remove any existing questions panel.
  2318→      const existing = content.querySelector('.questions-panel');
  2319→      if (existing) existing.remove();
  2320→
  2321→      const total = qs.length;
  2322→      let panelHtml = `<div class="questions-panel" id="questions-panel">
  2323→        <h2>💬 A few quick questions</h2>
  2324→        <p class="q-progress" id="q-progress">Please answer all ${total} question${total > 1 ? 's' : ''} before proceeding.</p>`;
  2325→
  2326→      qs.forEach((q, idx) => {
  2327→        const chips = (q.choices || []).map((c, ci) =>
  2328→          `<button class="q-chip" data-qidx="${idx}" data-cidx="${ci}" onclick="selectQChip(this, ${idx})">${c}</button>`
  2329→        ).join('');
  2330→        panelHtml += `
  2331→          <div class="question-item" id="q-item-${idx}">
  2332→            <div class="q-text">${idx + 1}. ${q.question}</div>
  2333→            ${chips ? `<div class="q-chips">${chips}</div>` : ''}
  2334→            <textarea class="q-input" id="q-input-${idx}" placeholder="Your answer…" oninput="updateQProgress()"></textarea>
  2335→          </div>`;
  2336→      });
  2337→
  2338→      panelHtml += `<button class="questions-submit-btn" id="q-submit-btn" onclick="submitAllAnswers()" disabled>Submit Answers</button></div>`;
  2339→
  2340→      // Append to the analysis content (already has the 4-section layout).
  2341→      content.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', panelHtml);
  2342→    }
  2343→
  2344→    // Handles chip selection: marks chip as selected, populates the text area.
  2345→    function selectQChip(btn, qIdx) {
  2346→      // Deselect sibling chips.
  2347→      const panel = document.getElementById(`q-item-${qIdx}`);
  2348→      if (panel) {
  2349→        panel.querySelectorAll('.q-chip').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
  2350→      }
  2351→      btn.classList.add('selected');
  2352→      const textarea = document.getElementById(`q-input-${qIdx}`);
  2353→      if (textarea) {
  2354→        textarea.value = btn.textContent;
  2355→        updateQProgress();
  2356→      }
  2357→    }
  2358→
  2359→    // Updates the progress label and enables/disables the Submit button.
  2360→    function updateQProgress() {
  2361→      const qs = window.postAnalysisQuestions || [];
  2362→      const answered = qs.filter((_, idx) => {
  2363→        const ta = document.getElementById(`q-input-${idx}`);
  2364→        return ta && ta.value.trim().length > 0;
  2365→      }).length;
  2366→      const progressEl = document.getElementById('q-progress');
  2367→      if (progressEl) {
  2368→        progressEl.textContent = `Answered ${answered} of ${qs.length}`;
  2369→      }
  2370→      const submitBtn = document.getElementById('q-submit-btn');
  2371→      if (submitBtn) {
  2372→        submitBtn.disabled = answered < qs.length;
  2373→      }
  2374→    }
  2375→
  2376→    // Collects all answers and persists them, then removes the panel.
  2377→    async function submitAllAnswers() {
  2378→      const qs = window.postAnalysisQuestions || [];
  2379→      qs.forEach((q, idx) => {
  2380→        const ta = document.getElementById(`q-input-${idx}`);
  2381→        if (ta && ta.value.trim()) {
  2382→          window.questionAnswers[q.type] = ta.value.trim();
  2383→        }
  2384→      });
  2385→      await persistPostAnalysisState();
  2386→      const panel = document.getElementById('questions-panel');
  2387→      if (panel) panel.remove();
  2388→      appendMessage('assistant', `✓ Thank you! ${qs.length} answer${qs.length > 1 ? 's' : ''} saved. Click "Recommend Customizations" when ready.`);
  2389→    }
  2390→
  2391→    // Legacy compatibility: keep these stubs so existing callers do not break.
  2392→    function showNextQuestion() { renderQuestionsPanel(); }
  2393→
  2394→    function handleQuestionResponse(message) {
  2395→      if (!window.postAnalysisQuestions || window.postAnalysisQuestions.length === 0) return false;
  2396→      if (!window.waitingForQuestionResponse) return false;

  2424→    function cleanJsonResponse(text) {
  2425→      if (typeof text !== 'string') return text;
  2426→      
  2427→      // Remove markdown code fences first
  2428→      text = text.replace(/^```json\s*/gm, '').replace(/\s*```$/gm, '');
  2429→      
  2430→      // Try to find a complete JSON object
  2431→      const match = text.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
  2432→      if (match) {
  2433→        return match[0].trim();
  2434→      }
  2435→      
  2436→      // If no JSON object found, return as-is (not JSON)
  2437→      return text;
  2438→    }

  2530→    async function handleCustomizationResponse(response) {
  2531→      try {
  2532→        const cleanResult = cleanJsonResponse(response);
  2533→        
  2534→        // Try to parse as JSON
  2535→        let data;
  2536→        if (typeof cleanResult === 'string') {
  2537→          // Check if it looks like JSON
  2538→          if (cleanResult.trim().startsWith('{') && cleanResult.trim().endsWith('}')) {
  2539→            try {
  2540→              data = JSON.parse(cleanResult);
  2541→            } catch (parseError) {
  2542→              // Not valid JSON, treat as text
  2543→              console.log('Not JSON, displaying as text:', parseError);
  2544→              appendMessage('assistant', response);
  2545→              return;
  2546→            }
  2547→          } else {
  2548→            // Doesn't look like JSON, treat as text
  2549→            appendMessage('assistant', response);
  2550→            return;
  2551→          }
  2552→        } else {
  2553→          data = cleanResult;
  2554→        }
  2555→        
  2556→        if (data && (data.recommended_experiences || data.recommended_skills)) {
  2557→          // Store for persistence
  2558→          tabData.customizations = data;
  2559→          window.pendingRecommendations = data;
  2560→          saveTabData();
  2561→          
  2562→          if (!isReconnecting) {
  2563→            appendMessage('assistant', '✅ Customizations generated! Please review the **Experiences** and **Skills** in the **Customizations** tab. Select your preferences using the action buttons, then submit your decisions.');
  2564→            
  2565→            // Switch to customizations tab to show the full view
  2566→            switchTab('customizations');
  2567→            
  2568→            // Populate with interactive review tables
  2569→            await populateCustomizationsTabWithReview(data);
  2570→          }
  2571→        } else {
  2572→          if (!isReconnecting) {
  2573→            appendMessage('assistant', response);
  2574→          }
  2575→        }
  2576→      } catch (e) {
  2577→        console.error('Customization response error:', e);
  2578→        if (!isReconnecting) {
  2579→          appendMessage('assistant', response);
  2580→        }
  2581→      }
  2582→    }

  2626→    async function startInteractiveReview() {

  2629→        return;
  2630→      }

  2632→      const data = window.pendingRecommendations;

  2642→        // Get all experience IDs from master CV data

  2644→          interactiveState.allExperiences = statusData.all_experience_ids;
  2645→          interactiveState.recommendedSet = new Set(data.recommended_experiences || []);
  2646→          
  2647→          // Store user's explicit exclusions (check both title and ID)
  2648→          interactiveState.userExclusions = new Set(['tnt3', 'warnes wireless', 'warnes_wireless']);
  2649→        } else {
  2650→          // Fallback to just recommended if we can't get all
  2651→          interactiveState.allExperiences = data.recommended_experiences || [];
  2652→          interactiveState.recommendedSet = new Set(data.recommended_experiences || []);
  2653→          interactiveState.userExclusions = new Set(['tnt3', 'warnes wireless', 'warnes_wireless']);
  2654→        }
  2655→      } catch (error) {
  2656→        console.warn('Could not fetch full experience list:', error);
  2657→        interactiveState.allExperiences = data.recommended_experiences || [];
  2658→        interactiveState.recommendedSet = new Set(data.recommended_experiences || []);

  2660→      }
  2661→      
  2662→      if (interactiveState.allExperiences && interactiveState.allExperiences.length > 0) {
  2663→        interactiveState.type = 'experiences';
  2664→        const totalCount = interactiveState.allExperiences.length;
  2665→        const excludedCount = Array.from(interactiveState.allExperiences).filter(exp => 
  2666→          Array.from(interactiveState.userExclusions).some(excl => exp.toLowerCase().includes(excl.toLowerCase()))
  2667→        ).length;
  2668→        appendMessage('assistant', `Great! I'll walk you through all ${totalCount} experience entries${excludedCount > 0 ? ` (skipping ${excludedCount} you explicitly excluded)` : ''}. I'll ask about them one at a time.`);
  2669→        setTimeout(() => showNextExperience(), 800);
  2670→      } else if (data.recommended_skills && data.recommended_skills.length > 0) {

  2672→        appendMessage('assistant', 'Let me walk you through the skill recommendations.');
  2673→        setTimeout(() => showSkillsSummary(), 800);
  2674→      }
  2675→    }

  2677→    async function showNextExperience() {
  2678→      const data = interactiveState.data;
  2679→      const experiences = interactiveState.allExperiences || data.recommended_experiences;
  2680→      const index = interactiveState.currentIndex;
  2681→      
  2682→      // Find next experience that isn't user-excluded
  2683→      let currentExp = null;
  2684→      let currentIndex = index;
  2685→      while (currentIndex < experiences.length) {
  2686→        const exp = experiences[currentIndex];
  2687→        const isExcluded = Array.from(interactiveState.userExclusions || []).some(excl => 
  2688→          exp.toLowerCase().includes(excl.toLowerCase())
  2689→        );
  2690→        
  2691→        if (!isExcluded) {
  2692→          currentExp = exp;
  2693→          break;
  2694→        }
  2695→        currentIndex++;
  2696→      }
  2697→      
  2698→      // Update index for next iteration
  2699→      interactiveState.currentIndex = currentIndex + 1;
  2700→      
  2701→      if (!currentExp) {
  2702→        // No more experiences, move to skills
  2703→        if (data.recommended_skills && data.recommended_skills.length > 0) {
  2704→          appendMessage('assistant', 'Great! Now let me tell you about the skill recommendations.');

  2706→        } else {
  2707→          finishInteractiveReview();
  2708→        }
  2709→        return;
  2710→      }
  2711→      
  2712→      const expId = currentExp;
  2713→      const isRecommended = (interactiveState.recommendedSet || new Set()).has(expId);
  2714→      const confidence = getConfidenceLevel(expId, data);
  2715→      const reasoning = getExperienceReasoning(expId, data);
  2716→      
  2717→      // Try to get real experience details
  2718→      const details = await getExperienceDetails(expId);
  2719→      
  2720→      let message = `**Experience ${currentIndex + 1}/${experiences.length}: ${expId}** `;
  2721→      message += isRecommended ? `(${confidence.text})\n\n` : `(Not Recommended)\n\n`;
  2722→      
  2723→      if (details) {
  2724→        message += `**${details.title}** at **${details.company}**\n`;
  2725→        if (details.duration) {
  2726→          message += `${details.duration}\n`;
  2727→        }
  2728→        message += `\n`;
  2729→        if (details.summary) {
  2730→          message += `${details.summary}\n\n`;
  2731→        }
  2732→        if (details.key_achievements && details.key_achievements.length > 0) {
  2733→          message += `**Key Achievement:** ${details.key_achievements[0]}\n\n`;
  2734→        }
  2735→      } else {
  2736→        message += `*Experience details not found in CV data*\n\n`;
  2737→      }
  2738→      
  2739→      if (isRecommended) {
  2740→        message += `**Why I recommend including this:** ${reasoning}\n\n`;
  2741→        message += `Should I include this experience prominently in your CV? (yes/no/maybe)`;
  2742→      } else {
  2743→        message += `**Why I suggest excluding this:** This experience doesn't align strongly with the job requirements for ${data.job_analysis?.title || 'this position'}.\n\n`;
  2744→        message += `Do you want to include this anyway? (yes/no/maybe)`;
  2745→      }
  2746→      
  2747→      appendMessage('assistant', message);
  2748→      
  2749→      // Set up to wait for user response
  2750→      window.waitingForExperienceResponse = true;
  2751→    }

  2781→    async function handleExperienceResponse(message) {
  2782→      window.waitingForExperienceResponse = false;
  2783→      const response = message.toLowerCase();
  2784→      
  2785→      if (response.includes('yes')) {
  2786→        appendMessage('assistant', 'Great! I\'ll include this experience prominently.');
  2787→      } else if (response.includes('no')) {
  2788→        appendMessage('assistant', 'Understood. I\'ll exclude this experience from the final CV.');
  2789→      } else if (response.includes('maybe')) {
  2790→        appendMessage('assistant', 'I\'ll include it but with less emphasis.');
  2791→      } else {
  2792→        appendMessage('assistant', 'I\'ll note your feedback on this experience.');
  2793→      }
  2794→      
  2795→      // Move to next experience (currentIndex already incremented in showNextExperience)
  2796→      setTimeout(() => showNextExperience(), 800);
  2797→    }
  2798→    
  2799→    async function handleSkillsResponse(message) {
  2800→      window.waitingForSkillsResponse = false;
  2801→      const response = message.toLowerCase();

  2805→      } else if (response.includes('no') || response.includes('modify')) {

  2811→      finishInteractiveReview();

  2814→    async function getExperienceDetails(expId) {
  2815→      try {
  2816→        const res = await fetch('/api/experience-details', {
  2817→          method: 'POST',
  2818→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  2819→          body: JSON.stringify({ experience_id: expId })
  2820→        });
  2821→        
  2822→        if (res.ok) {
  2823→          const data = await res.json();
  2824→          return data.experience || null;
  2825→        } else {
  2826→          console.warn('Could not fetch experience details for', expId);
  2827→          return null;
  2828→        }
  2829→      } catch (error) {
  2830→        console.warn('Error fetching experience details:', error);
  2831→        return null;
  2832→      }
  2833→    }

  2844→    async function populateCVEditorTab() {

  2847→

  3240→    async function buildExperienceReviewTable() {
  3241→      const data = window.pendingRecommendations;
  3242→      const container = document.getElementById('experience-table-container');
  3243→      
  3244→      // Get all experiences with details
  3245→      let allExperienceIds = [];
  3246→      try {
  3247→        const statusRes = await fetch('/api/status');
  3248→        const statusData = await statusRes.json();
  3249→        allExperienceIds = statusData.all_experience_ids || data.recommended_experiences || [];
  3250→      } catch (error) {
  3251→        allExperienceIds = data.recommended_experiences || [];
  3252→      }
  3253→      
  3254→      const recommendedSet = new Set(data.recommended_experiences || []);
  3255→      
  3256→      // Fetch all experience details and sort by start date (most recent first)
  3257→      const experiencesWithDetails = [];
  3258→      for (const expId of allExperienceIds) {
  3259→        const details = await getExperienceDetails(expId);
  3260→        experiencesWithDetails.push({ id: expId, details });
  3261→      }
  3262→      
  3263→      // Sort by start date (most recent first)
  3264→      experiencesWithDetails.sort((a, b) => {
  3265→        const aStart = a.details?.start_date || '0';
  3266→        const bStart = b.details?.start_date || '0';
  3267→        return bStart.localeCompare(aStart);
  3268→      });
  3269→      
  3270→      // Build table HTML
  3271→      let tableHTML = `
  3272→        <table id="experience-review-table" class="review-table">
  3273→          <thead>
  3274→            <tr>
  3275→              <th>Experience</th>
  3276→              <th>Dates</th>
  3277→              <th>Recommendation</th>
  3278→              <th>Confidence</th>
  3279→              <th>Reasoning</th>
  3280→              <th>Your Selection</th>
  3281→            </tr>
  3282→          </thead>
  3283→          <tbody>
  3284→      `;
  3285→      
  3286→      for (const { id: expId, details } of experiencesWithDetails) {
  3287→        const isRecommended = recommendedSet.has(expId);
  3288→        const recommendation = getExperienceRecommendation(expId, data);
  3289→        const confidence = getConfidenceLevel(expId, data);
  3290→        const reasoning = getExperienceReasoning(expId, data);
  3291→        
  3292→        const title = details ? details.title : expId;
  3293→        const company = details ? details.company : '';
  3294→        const startDate = details?.start_date || '';
  3295→        const endDate = details?.end_date || 'present';
  3296→        const duration = startDate && endDate ? `${startDate} - ${endDate}` : (details?.duration || '');
  3297→        
  3298→        // Determine default action based on LLM recommendation level
  3299→        let defaultAction = 'exclude';
  3300→        if (recommendation === 'Emphasize') {
  3301→          defaultAction = 'emphasize';
  3302→        } else if (recommendation === 'Include') {
  3303→          defaultAction = 'include';
  3304→        } else if (recommendation === 'De-emphasize') {
  3305→          defaultAction = 'de-emphasize';
  3306→        } else if (recommendation === 'Omit') {
  3307→          defaultAction = 'exclude';
  3308→        } else if (isRecommended) {
  3309→          // Fallback for backwards compatibility with old format
  3310→          defaultAction = 'include';
  3311→        }
  3312→        
  3313→        // Store default selection
  3314→        userSelections.experiences[expId] = defaultAction;
  3315→        
  3316→        // Prepare display text - show the actual LLM recommendation
  3317→        const recommendationText = recommendation || "Include";
  3318→        const confidenceBadge = `<span class="confidence-badge confidence-${confidence.level}">${confidence.text}</span>`;
  3319→        const reasoningText = reasoning || "This experience was selected based on its relevance to the position requirements.";
  3320→        
  3321→        tableHTML += `
  3322→          <tr data-exp-id="${expId}" data-start-date="${startDate}">
  3323→            <td>
  3324→              <strong>${title}</strong><br>
  3325→              <span style="color: #6b7280;">${company}</span>
  3326→            </td>
  3327→            <td style="white-space: nowrap;">${duration}</td>
  3328→            <td><strong>${recommendationText}</strong></td>
  3329→            <td>${confidenceBadge}</td>
  3330→            <td style="max-width: 300px;"><small>${reasoningText}</small></td>
  3331→            <td class="action-btns">
  3332→              <button class="icon-btn ${defaultAction === 'emphasize' ? 'active' : ''}" data-action="emphasize" title="Emphasize - Feature prominently with full details" onclick="handleActionClick('${expId}', 'emphasize', 'experience')" style="color: #10b981; font-size: 1.5em;">➕</button>
  3333→              <button class="icon-btn ${defaultAction === 'include' ? 'active' : ''}" data-action="include" title="Include - Standard treatment" onclick="handleActionClick('${expId}', 'include', 'experience')" style="font-size: 1.3em;">✓</button>
  3334→              <button class="icon-btn ${defaultAction === 'de-emphasize' ? 'active' : ''}" data-action="de-emphasize" title="De-emphasize - Brief mention only" onclick="handleActionClick('${expId}', 'de-emphasize', 'experience')" style="color: #f59e0b; font-size: 1.5em;">➖</button>
  3335→              <button class="icon-btn ${defaultAction === 'exclude' ? 'active' : ''}" data-action="exclude" title="Exclude - Omit from CV" onclick="handleActionClick('${expId}', 'exclude', 'experience')" style="color: #ef4444; font-size: 1.3em;">✗</button>
  3336→              <button class="icon-btn" title="Reorder bullet points for this experience" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showBulletReorder('${expId}', '${(title||'').replace(/'/g,'\\'')}')" style="color:#6366f1;font-size:1.1em;">↕</button>
  3337→            </td>
  3338→          </tr>
  3339→        `;
  3340→      }
  3341→      
  3342→      tableHTML += `
  3343→          </tbody>
  3344→        </table>
  3345→      `;
  3346→      
  3347→      container.innerHTML = tableHTML;
  3348→      
  3349→      // Initialize DataTable
  3350→      $('#experience-review-table').DataTable({
  3351→        paging: false,
  3352→        order: [[1, 'desc']], // Sort by dates column (most recent first)
  3353→        language: {
  3354→          search: "Filter experiences:"
  3355→        }
  3356→      });
  3357→    }
  3358→    
  3359→    async function buildSkillsReviewTable() {
  3360→      const data = window.pendingRecommendations;
  3361→      const container = document.getElementById('skills-table-container');
  3362→      
  3363→      // Get all skills from the API status
  3364→      let allSkills = [];
  3365→      try {
  3366→        const statusRes = await fetch('/api/status');
  3367→        const statusData = await statusRes.json();
  3368→        allSkills = statusData.all_skills || [];
  3369→      } catch (error) {
  3370→        console.error('Error fetching all skills:', error);
  3371→        // Fallback to just recommended skills
  3372→        allSkills = data.recommended_skills || [];
  3373→      }
  3374→      
  3375→      // If we got no skills, show a message
  3376→      if (allSkills.length === 0) {
  3377→        container.innerHTML = '<p style="padding: 20px; text-align: center; color: #6b7280;">No skills found in master CV data.</p>';
  3378→        return;
  3379→      }
  3380→
  3381→      // Sort skills: Emphasize > Include > De-emphasize > Omit
  3382→      const recommendationOrder = { 'Emphasize': 0, 'Include': 1, 'De-emphasize': 2, 'Omit': 3 };
  3383→      allSkills = allSkills.slice().sort((a, b) => {
  3384→        const aName = typeof a === 'string' ? a : a.name || a;
  3385→        const bName = typeof b === 'string' ? b : b.name || b;
  3386→        const aOrder = recommendationOrder[getSkillRecommendation(aName, data)] ?? 3;
  3387→        const bOrder = recommendationOrder[getSkillRecommendation(bName, data)] ?? 3;
  3388→        return aOrder - bOrder;
  3389→      });
  3390→
  3391→      const recommendedSet = new Set(data.recommended_skills || []);
  3392→      
  3393→      let tableHTML = `
  3394→        <table id="skills-review-table" class="review-table">
  3395→          <thead>
  3396→            <tr>
  3397→              <th>Skill</th>
  3398→              <th>Recommendation</th>
  3399→              <th>Confidence</th>
  3400→              <th>Reasoning</th>
  3401→              <th>Your Selection</th>
  3402→            </tr>
  3403→          </thead>
  3404→          <tbody>
  3405→      `;
  3406→      
  3407→      for (const skill of allSkills) {
  3408→        const skillName = typeof skill === 'string' ? skill : skill.name || skill;
  3409→        const isRecommended = recommendedSet.has(skillName);
  3410→        const recommendation = getSkillRecommendation(skillName, data);
  3411→        const confidence = getSkillConfidence(skillName, data);
  3412→        const reasoning = getSkillReasoning(skillName, data);
  3413→        
  3414→        // Determine default action based on LLM recommendation level
  3415→        let defaultAction = 'exclude';
  3416→        if (recommendation === 'Emphasize') {
  3417→          defaultAction = 'emphasize';
  3418→        } else if (recommendation === 'Include') {
  3419→          defaultAction = 'include';
  3420→        } else if (recommendation === 'De-emphasize') {
  3421→          defaultAction = 'de-emphasize';
  3422→        } else if (recommendation === 'Omit') {
  3423→          defaultAction = 'exclude';
  3424→        } else if (isRecommended) {
  3425→          // Fallback for backwards compatibility
  3426→          defaultAction = 'include';
  3427→        }
  3428→        
  3429→        // Store default selection
  3430→        userSelections.skills[skillName] = defaultAction;
  3431→        
  3432→        // Prepare display text - show the actual LLM recommendation
  3433→        const recommendationText = recommendation || "Omit";
  3434→        const confidenceBadge = `<span class="confidence-badge confidence-${confidence.level}">${confidence.text}</span>`;
  3435→        const reasoningText = reasoning || "This skill was not specifically mentioned in the job requirements.";
  3436→        
  3437→        tableHTML += `
  3438→          <tr data-skill="${skillName}">
  3439→            <td><strong>${skillName}</strong></td>
  3440→            <td><strong>${recommendationText}</strong></td>
  3441→            <td>${confidenceBadge}</td>
  3442→            <td style="max-width: 300px;"><small>${reasoningText}</small></td>
  3443→            <td class="action-btns">
  3444→              <button class="icon-btn ${defaultAction === 'emphasize' ? 'active' : ''}" data-action="emphasize" title="Emphasize - Feature prominently" onclick="handleActionClick('${skillName}', 'emphasize', 'skill')" style="color: #10b981; font-size: 1.5em;">➕</button>
  3445→              <button class="icon-btn ${defaultAction === 'include' ? 'active' : ''}" data-action="include" title="Include - Standard listing" onclick="handleActionClick('${skillName}', 'include', 'skill')" style="font-size: 1.3em;">✓</button>
  3446→              <button class="icon-btn ${defaultAction === 'de-emphasize' ? 'active' : ''}" data-action="de-emphasize" title="De-emphasize - Brief mention" onclick="handleActionClick('${skillName}', 'de-emphasize', 'skill')" style="color: #f59e0b; font-size: 1.5em;">➖</button>
  3447→              <button class="icon-btn ${defaultAction === 'exclude' ? 'active' : ''}" data-action="exclude" title="Exclude - Omit from CV" onclick="handleActionClick('${skillName}', 'exclude', 'skill')" style="color: #ef4444; font-size: 1.3em;">✗</button>
  3448→            </td>
  3449→          </tr>
  3450→        `;
  3451→      }
  3452→      
  3453→      tableHTML += `
  3454→          </tbody>
  3455→        </table>
  3456→      `;
  3457→      
  3458→      container.innerHTML = tableHTML;
  3459→
  3460→      // Initialize DataTable
  3461→      $('#skills-review-table').DataTable({
  3462→        paging: false,
  3463→        language: {
  3464→          search: "Filter skills:"
  3465→        }
  3466→      });
  3467→    }
  3468→
  3469→    // Track publication accept/reject decisions: cite_key → true (accept) | false (reject)
  3470→    window.publicationDecisions = {};
  3471→
  3472→    async function buildPublicationsReviewTable() {
  3473→      const container = document.getElementById('publications-table-container');
  3474→      const section   = document.getElementById('publications-review-section');
  3475→      if (!container) return;
  3476→
  3477→      container.innerHTML = '<p style="padding: 20px; text-align: center; color: #6b7280;">Loading publication recommendations…</p>';
  3478→
  3479→      let recommendations = [];
  3480→      let totalCount = 0;
  3481→      try {
  3482→        const res  = await fetch('/api/publication-recommendations');
  3483→        const data = await res.json();
  3484→        if (!data.ok) { container.innerHTML = `<p class="error-message">${data.error || 'Failed to load publications.'}</p>`; return; }
  3485→        recommendations = data.recommendations || [];
  3486→        // total count shown in status
  3487→        const statusRes = await fetch('/api/status');
  3488→        const statusData = await statusRes.json();
  3489→        const jobAnalysis = statusData.job_analysis || {};
  3490→        totalCount = (typeof jobAnalysis === 'object' && jobAnalysis !== null) ? (window._pubTotalCount || recommendations.length) : recommendations.length;
  3491→      } catch (err) {
  3492→        console.error('Error fetching publication recommendations:', err);
  3493→        container.innerHTML = '<p style="color: #ef4444; padding: 20px;">Failed to load publication recommendations.</p>';
  3494→        return;
  3495→      }
  3496→
  3497→      if (recommendations.length === 0) {
  3498→        // No publications — keep section hidden
  3499→        if (section) section.style.display = 'none';
  3500→        return;
  3501→      }
  3502→
  3503→      // Show section
  3504→      if (section) section.style.display = '';
  3505→
  3506→      // Update heading count
  3507→      const heading = section ? section.querySelector('h2') : null;
  3508→      if (heading) {
  3509→        const total = totalCount > recommendations.length ? totalCount : recommendations.length;
  3510→        heading.textContent = `📄 Selected Publications (${recommendations.length} of ${total})`;
  3511→      }
  3512→
  3513→      // Initialise decisions — all accepted by default
  3514→      window.publicationDecisions = {};
  3515→      recommendations.forEach(pub => {
  3516→        window.publicationDecisions[pub.cite_key] = true;
  3517→      });
  3518→
  3519→      let tableHTML = `
  3520→        <table id="publications-review-table" class="review-table">
  3521→          <thead>
  3522→            <tr>
  3523→              <th>Rank</th>
  3524→              <th>Citation</th>
  3525→              <th>Venue</th>
  3526→              <th>Year</th>
  3527→              <th>1st Author</th>
  3528→              <th>Score</th>
  3529→              <th>Rationale</th>
  3530→              <th>Include?</th>
  3531→            </tr>
  3532→          </thead>
  3533→          <tbody>
  3534→      `;
  3535→
  3536→      recommendations.forEach((pub, idx) => {
  3537→        const rank       = idx + 1;
  3538→        const citation   = pub.formatted_citation || [pub.title, pub.venue, pub.year].filter(Boolean).join('. ');
  3539→        const venue      = pub.venue || '<em style="color:#9ca3af">—</em>';
  3540→        const year       = pub.year || '—';
  3541→        const firstAuth  = pub.is_first_author ? '<span style="color:#10b981;font-weight:700;" title="First author">★</span>' : '<span style="color:#d1d5db;">☆</span>';
  3542→        const score      = pub.relevance_score != null ? pub.relevance_score : '—';
  3543→        const rationale  = pub.rationale ? `<small>${escapeHtml(pub.rationale)}</small>` : '';
  3544→        const venueWarn  = pub.venue_warning ? ` <span title="${escapeHtml(pub.venue_warning)}" style="color:#dc7900;cursor:help;">⚠</span>` : '';
  3545→        const citeKey    = pub.cite_key || '';
  3546→        const authSignals = (pub.authority_signals || []).map(s => `<span style="font-size:11px;background:#ede9fe;color:#5b21b6;border-radius:8px;padding:1px 6px;margin-right:3px;">${escapeHtml(s)}</span>`).join('');
  3547→
  3548→        tableHTML += `
  3549→          <tr data-cite-key="${escapeHtml(citeKey)}">
  3550→            <td style="text-align:center;font-weight:700;">${rank}</td>
  3551→            <td style="max-width:280px;font-size:0.87em;">${escapeHtml(citation)}${venueWarn}${authSignals ? '<br>' + authSignals : ''}</td>
  3552→            <td style="font-size:0.87em;">${venue}</td>
  3553→            <td style="text-align:center;">${year}</td>
  3554→            <td style="text-align:center;">${firstAuth}</td>
  3555→            <td style="text-align:center;"><strong>${score}</strong>/10</td>
  3556→            <td style="max-width:200px;">${rationale}</td>
  3557→            <td class="action-btns">
  3558→              <button class="icon-btn active" data-action="accept" title="Include in CV"
  3559→                  onclick="handlePubAction('${escapeHtml(citeKey)}', true)"
  3560→                  style="color:#10b981;font-size:1.3em;" id="pub-accept-${rank}">✓</button>
  3561→              <button class="icon-btn" data-action="reject" title="Exclude from CV"
  3562→                  onclick="handlePubAction('${escapeHtml(citeKey)}', false)"
  3563→                  style="color:#ef4444;font-size:1.3em;" id="pub-reject-${rank}">✗</button>
  3564→            </td>
  3565→          </tr>
  3566→        `;
  3567→      });
  3568→
  3569→      tableHTML += '</tbody></table>';
  3570→      container.innerHTML = tableHTML;
  3571→
  3572→      // Initialize DataTable
  3573→      $('#publications-review-table').DataTable({
  3574→        paging: false,
  3575→        order: [[0, 'asc']],
  3576→        language: { search: "Filter publications:" }
  3577→      });
  3578→    }
  3579→
  3580→    function handlePubAction(citeKey, accept) {
  3581→      window.publicationDecisions[citeKey] = accept;
  3582→      // update button active states in the row
  3583→      const row = document.querySelector(`tr[data-cite-key="${CSS.escape(citeKey)}"]`);
  3584→      if (!row) return;
  3585→      row.querySelectorAll('.icon-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
  3586→      const action = accept ? 'accept' : 'reject';
  3587→      const btn = row.querySelector(`[data-action="${action}"]`);
  3588→      if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
  3589→    }
  3590→
  3591→    async function submitPublicationDecisions() {
  3592→      const decisions = window.publicationDecisions || {};
  3593→      const count = Object.keys(decisions).length;
  3594→      if (count === 0) {
  3595→        showAlertModal('No Publications', 'No publication decisions to save.');
  3596→        return;
  3597→      }
  3598→
  3599→      // Persist as a structured answer in session state via post-analysis-responses
  3600→      const accepted = Object.entries(decisions)
  3601→        .filter(([, v]) => v)
  3602→        .map(([k]) => k);
  3603→      const rejected = Object.entries(decisions)
  3604→        .filter(([, v]) => !v)
  3605→        .map(([k]) => k);
  3606→
  3607→      const answersPayload = {
  3608→        publication_accepted: accepted.join(', '),
  3609→        publication_rejected: rejected.join(', '),
  3610→      };
  3611→
  3612→      try {
  3613→        const response = await fetch('/api/post-analysis-responses', {
  3614→          method: 'POST',
  3615→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  3616→          body: JSON.stringify({ questions: [], answers: answersPayload })
  3617→        });
  3618→
  3619→        if (response.ok) {
  3620→          showAlertModal(
  3621→            '✅ Publication Selections Saved',
  3622→            `Kept <strong>${accepted.length}</strong> publication${accepted.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}; excluded <strong>${rejected.length}</strong>.<br><br>These selections will be applied when generating your CV.`
  3623→          );
  3624→        } else {
  3625→          const err = await response.json();
  3626→          showAlertModal('❌ Error', `Failed to save publication selections: ${err.error || 'Unknown error'}`);
  3627→        }
  3628→      } catch (err) {
  3629→        console.error('Error saving publication decisions:', err);
  3630→        showAlertModal('❌ Error', 'Failed to save publication selections. Please try again.');
  3631→      }
  3632→    }
  3633→
  3634→    function handleActionClick(itemId, action, type) {
  3635→      // Remove active class from all buttons in this row
  3636→      const row = type === 'experience' 
  3637→        ? document.querySelector(`tr[data-exp-id="${itemId}"]`)
  3638→        : document.querySelector(`tr[data-skill="${itemId}"]`);
  3639→      
  3640→      const buttons = row.querySelectorAll('.icon-btn');
  3641→      buttons.forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
  3642→      
  3643→      // Add active class to clicked button
  3644→      const clickedBtn = row.querySelector(`[data-action="${action}"]`);
  3645→      clickedBtn.classList.add('active');
  3646→      
  3647→      // Store selection
  3648→      if (type === 'experience') {
  3649→        userSelections.experiences[itemId] = action;
  3650→      } else {
  3651→        userSelections.skills[itemId] = action;
  3652→      }
  3653→    }
  3654→    
  3655→    async function submitExperienceDecisions() {
  3656→      const decisions = userSelections.experiences;
  3657→      const count = Object.keys(decisions).length;
  3658→      
  3659→      if (count === 0) {
  3660→        showAlertModal('No Selections', 'Please select actions for at least one experience before submitting.');
  3661→        return;
  3662→      }
  3663→      
  3664→      try {
  3665→        const response = await fetch('/api/review-decisions', {
  3666→          method: 'POST',
  3667→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  3668→          body: JSON.stringify({
  3669→            type: 'experiences',
  3670→            decisions: decisions
  3671→          })
  3672→        });
  3673→        
  3674→        if (response.ok) {
  3675→          const result = await response.json();
  3676→          showAlertModal('✅ Experience Decisions Submitted', `Submitted decisions for ${count} experiences. ${result.message || 'Saved successfully!'}<br><br><strong>Next:</strong> Submit your skill decisions below.`);
  3677→        } else {
  3678→          const error = await response.json();
  3679→          showAlertModal('❌ Error', `Error submitting decisions: ${error.error || 'Unknown error'}`);
  3680→        }
  3681→      } catch (error) {
  3682→        console.error('Error submitting experience decisions:', error);
  3683→        showAlertModal('❌ Error', 'Failed to submit decisions. Please try again.');
  3684→      }
  3685→    }
  3686→    
  3687→    async function submitSkillDecisions() {
  3688→      const decisions = userSelections.skills;
  3689→      const count = Object.keys(decisions).length;
  3690→      
  3691→      if (count === 0) {
  3692→        showAlertModal('No Selections', 'Please select actions for at least one skill before submitting.');
  3693→        return;
  3694→      }
  3695→      
  3696→      try {
  3697→        const response = await fetch('/api/review-decisions', {
  3698→          method: 'POST',
  3699→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  3700→          body: JSON.stringify({
  3701→            type: 'skills',
  3702→            decisions: decisions
  3703→          })
  3704→        });
  3705→        
  3706→        if (response.ok) {
  3707→          const result = await response.json();
  3708→          showAlertModal('✅ Skill Decisions Submitted', `Submitted decisions for ${count} skills. ${result.message || 'Saved successfully!'}<br><br><strong>You can now click "Generate CV" to create your customized CV.</strong>`);
  3709→          
  3710→          // Add confirmation message to conversation
  3711→          if (Object.keys(userSelections.experiences).length > 0 && Object.keys(userSelections.skills).length > 0) {
  3712→            appendMessage('assistant', '✅ All decisions recorded! You can now click "Generate CV" to create your customized CV, or adjust your selections in the Customizations tab.');
  3713→          }
  3714→        } else {
  3715→          const error = await response.json();
  3716→          showAlertModal('❌ Error', `Error submitting decisions: ${error.error || 'Unknown error'}`);
  3717→        }
  3718→      } catch (error) {
  3719→        console.error('Error submitting skill decisions:', error);
  3720→        showAlertModal('❌ Error', 'Failed to submit decisions. Please try again.');
  3721→      }
  3722→    }
  3723→    
  3724→    // ==== End Table-Based Review Functions ====
  3725→
  3726→    async function populateCustomizationsTab(data) {
  3727→      // Store for persistence
  3728→      tabData.customizations = data;
  3729→      
  3730→      const content = document.getElementById('document-content');
  3731→      let html = '<h1>⚙️ Recommended Customizations</h1>';
  3732→      
  3733→      if (data.recommended_experiences && data.recommended_experiences.length > 0) {
  3734→        html += '<h2>📊 Recommended Experiences</h2>';
  3735→        
  3736→        // Fetch details for each experience
  3737→        for (const exp of data.recommended_experiences) {
  3738→          const confidence = getConfidenceLevel(exp, data);
  3739→          const reasoning = getExperienceReasoning(exp, data);
  3740→          const details = await getExperienceDetails(exp);
  3741→          
  3742→          html += `
  3743→            <div style="border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; margin: 12px 0; padding: 16px; background: white;">
  3744→              <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 8px;">
  3745→                <h3 style="margin: 0; color: #1f2937;">${exp}</h3>
  3746→                <span class="confidence-badge confidence-${confidence.level}">${confidence.text}</span>
  3747→              </div>`;
  3748→          
  3749→          if (details) {
  3750→            // Build duration from dates
  3751→            let duration = '';
  3752→            if (details.start_date || details.end_date) {
  3753→              duration = `${details.start_date || ''} - ${details.end_date || 'Present'}`;
  3754→            }
  3755→            
  3756→            html += `
  3757→              <div style="margin: 8px 0; padding: 12px; background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 6px;">
  3758→                <h4 style="margin: 0 0 8px 0; color: #2563eb;">${details.title || 'Position Title'}</h4>
  3759→                <p style="margin: 4px 0; color: #6b7280;"><strong>${details.company || 'Company'}</strong>${duration ? ' • ' + duration : ''}</p>`;
  3760→            
  3761→            if (details.achievements && details.achievements.length > 0) {
  3762→              html += '<p style="margin: 8px 0; color: #374151;"><strong>Key Achievements:</strong></p><ul style="margin: 4px 0; color: #6b7280;">';
  3763→              details.achievements.slice(0, 3).forEach(achievement => {
  3764→                const text = achievement.text || achievement;
  3765→                html += `<li>${text}</li>`;
  3766→              });
  3767→              html += '</ul>';
  3768→            }
  3769→            html += '</div>';
  3770→          } else {
  3771→            html += '<p style="margin: 8px 0; color: #6b7280; font-style: italic;">Experience details not found in master CV data</p>';
  3772→          }
  3773→          
  3774→          html += `
  3775→              <div style="background: #f9fafb; padding: 12px; border-radius: 6px; border-left: 4px solid #3b82f6;">
  3776→                <strong>Why this experience:</strong> ${reasoning}
  3777→              </div>
  3778→            </div>
  3779→          `;
  3780→        }
  3781→      }
  3782→      
  3783→      if (data.recommended_skills && data.recommended_skills.length > 0) {
  3784→        html += '<h2>🛠️ Recommended Skills to Emphasize</h2>';
  3785→        
  3786→        data.recommended_skills.forEach((skill, index) => {
  3787→          const confidence = getSkillConfidence(skill, data);
  3788→          const reasoning = getSkillReasoning(skill, data);
  3789→          
  3790→          html += `
  3791→            <div style="border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; margin: 12px 0; padding: 16px; background: white;">
  3792→              <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 8px;">

  4070→    let rewriteDecisions = {};  // { id: { outcome: 'accept'|'reject'|'edit', final_text: null|string } }

  4072→    async function fetchAndReviewRewrites() {

  4086→          // No rewrites — go straight to generation

  4096→      } catch (err) {

  4103→    function renderRewritePanel(rewrites) {
