  4110→          </p>
  4111→          <div class="rewrite-tally-bar" id="rewrite-tally">
  4112→            <span class="tally-accepted">✓ Accepted: <strong id="tally-accepted">0</strong></span>
  4113→            <span class="tally-rejected">✗ Rejected: <strong id="tally-rejected">0</strong></span>
  4114→            <span class="tally-pending">⏳ Pending: <strong id="tally-pending">${rewrites.length}</strong></span>
  4115→            <button class="submit-rewrites-btn" id="submit-rewrites-btn" disabled
  4116→                    onclick="submitRewriteDecisions()">Submit All Decisions</button>
  4117→          </div>
  4118→          <div id="rewrite-cards">
  4119→            ${rewrites.map(r => renderRewriteCard(r)).join('')}
  4120→          </div>
  4121→        </div>
  4122→      `;
  4123→    }
  4124→
  4125→    /**
  4126→     * computeWordDiff(original, proposed) — LCS word-level diff.
  4127→     *
  4128→     * Tokenises both strings by splitting on whitespace boundaries while
  4129→     * preserving the whitespace tokens so the rendered diff has the same
  4130→     * spacing as the source text.  Returns an array of
  4131→     * {token: string, type: 'unchanged'|'removed'|'added'}.
  4132→     */
  4133→    function computeWordDiff(original, proposed) {
  4134→      // Split on whitespace but keep the separators as tokens.
  4135→      function tokenize(str) { return (str || '').split(/(\s+)/); }
  4136→
  4137→      const a = tokenize(original);
  4138→      const b = tokenize(proposed);
  4139→      const m = a.length;
  4140→      const n = b.length;
  4141→
  4142→      // Build LCS DP table (O(m*n) — acceptable for CV bullet lengths).
  4143→      const dp = Array.from({length: m + 1}, () => new Array(n + 1).fill(0));
  4144→      for (let i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
  4145→        for (let j = 1; j <= n; j++) {
  4146→          dp[i][j] = a[i - 1] === b[j - 1]
  4147→            ? dp[i - 1][j - 1] + 1
  4148→            : Math.max(dp[i - 1][j], dp[i][j - 1]);
  4149→        }
  4150→      }
  4151→
  4152→      // Backtrack to produce the diff sequence.
  4153→      const result = [];
  4154→      let i = m, j = n;
  4155→      while (i > 0 || j > 0) {
  4156→        if (i > 0 && j > 0 && a[i - 1] === b[j - 1]) {
  4157→          result.unshift({token: a[i - 1], type: 'unchanged'});
  4158→          i--; j--;
  4159→        } else if (j > 0 && (i === 0 || dp[i][j - 1] >= dp[i - 1][j])) {
  4160→          result.unshift({token: b[j - 1], type: 'added'});
  4161→          j--;
  4162→        } else {
  4163→          result.unshift({token: a[i - 1], type: 'removed'});
  4164→          i--;
  4165→        }
  4166→      }
  4167→      return result;
  4168→    }
  4169→
  4170→    /** Render a {token, type} diff array into an HTML string. */
  4171→    function renderDiffHtml(tokens) {
  4172→      return tokens.map(t => {
  4173→        if (t.type === 'removed') return `<del class="diff-removed">${escapeHtml(t.token)}</del>`;
  4174→        if (t.type === 'added')   return `<ins class="diff-added">${escapeHtml(t.token)}</ins>`;
  4175→        return escapeHtml(t.token);
  4176→      }).join('');
  4177→    }
  4178→
  4179→    function renderRewriteCard(r) {
  4180→      const isWeakSkillAdd = r.type === 'skill_add' && r.evidence_strength === 'weak';
  4181→      const weakBadge     = isWeakSkillAdd
  4182→        ? `<span class="weak-badge">⚠ Candidate to confirm</span>`
  4183→        : '';
  4184→      // Keyword pills with position-based rank badge (#1, #2, …)
  4185→      const keywordPills  = (r.keywords_introduced || [])
  4186→        .map((k, idx) => `<span class="rewrite-keyword"><span class="kw-rank">#${idx + 1}</span>${escapeHtml(k)}</span>`)
  4187→        .join('');
  4188→      const typeLabel = (r.type || 'rewrite').replace(/_/g, ' ');
  4189→      // Sanitize ID: keep only alphanumeric, underscore, and hyphen so it is
  4190→      // safe as both an HTML attribute value and a JS string literal in onclick.
  4191→      const cardId    = String(r.id).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, '_');
  4192→
  4193→      // Compute word-level diff for the inline display.
  4194→      const diffTokens = computeWordDiff(r.original || '', r.proposed || '');
  4195→      const diffHtml   = renderDiffHtml(diffTokens);
  4196→
  4197→      return `
  4198→        <div class="rewrite-card" id="rw-card-${cardId}">
  4199→          <div class="rewrite-card-header">
  4200→            <span class="rewrite-card-type">${escapeHtml(typeLabel)}</span>
  4201→            <span class="rewrite-card-title">${escapeHtml(r.location || r.id)}</span>
  4202→            ${weakBadge}
  4203→          </div>
  4204→          <div class="rewrite-card-body">
  4205→            <div class="rewrite-inline-diff" id="rw-diff-${cardId}"
  4206→                 data-original="${escapeHtml(r.original || '')}">${diffHtml}</div>
  4207→            <div class="rewrite-after" id="rw-after-${cardId}" style="display:none">
  4208→              <span id="rw-after-text-${cardId}">${escapeHtml(r.proposed || '')}</span>
  4209→            </div>
  4210→            ${keywordPills ? `<div class="rewrite-keywords">${keywordPills}</div>` : ''}
  4211→            ${r.rationale ? `
  4212→            <details class="rewrite-rationale">
  4213→              <summary>Rationale &amp; Evidence</summary>
  4214→              <p style="margin:6px 0 0;">${escapeHtml(r.rationale)}</p>
  4215→              ${r.evidence ? `<p style="color:#9ca3af;font-size:0.85em;margin:4px 0 0;">${escapeHtml(r.evidence)}</p>` : ''}
  4216→            </details>` : ''}
  4217→            <div class="rewrite-actions">
  4218→              <button class="rw-btn accept" id="rw-accept-${cardId}" onclick="applyRewriteAction('${cardId}', 'accept')">✓ Accept</button>
  4219→              <button class="rw-btn edit"   id="rw-edit-${cardId}"   onclick="applyRewriteAction('${cardId}', 'edit')">✎ Edit</button>
  4220→              <button class="rw-btn reject" id="rw-reject-${cardId}" onclick="applyRewriteAction('${cardId}', 'reject')">✗ Reject</button>
  4221→            </div>
  4222→          </div>
  4223→        </div>`;
  4224→    }
  4225→
  4226→    function applyRewriteAction(id, outcome) {
  4227→      const card    = document.getElementById(`rw-card-${id}`);
  4228→      const afterEl = document.getElementById(`rw-after-${id}`);
  4229→      const diffEl  = document.getElementById(`rw-diff-${id}`);
  4230→      if (!card || !afterEl) return;
  4231→
  4232→      // Clear any previous outcome styling
  4233→      card.classList.remove('accepted', 'rejected');
  4234→      ['accept', 'edit', 'reject'].forEach(a => {
  4235→        document.getElementById(`rw-${a}-${id}`)?.classList.remove('active');
  4236→      });
  4237→
  4238→      if (outcome === 'edit') {
  4239→        // Hide the inline diff; show the editable textarea in its place.
  4240→        const currentText = afterEl.querySelector(`#rw-after-text-${id}`)?.textContent
  4241→                         ?? rewriteDecisions[id]?.final_text
  4242→                         ?? '';
  4243→        if (diffEl) diffEl.style.display = 'none';
  4244→        afterEl.style.display = 'block';
  4245→        afterEl.innerHTML = `
  4246→          <textarea id="rw-textarea-${id}">${escapeHtml(currentText)}</textarea>
  4247→          <button class="rw-save-edit-btn" style="margin-top:6px"
  4248→                  onclick="saveRewriteEdit('${id}')">Save</button>
  4249→        `;
  4250→        document.getElementById(`rw-edit-${id}`)?.classList.add('active');
  4251→        // Decision is recorded only when the user clicks Save
  4252→      } else {
  4253→        // Restore the after-text span if we previously entered edit mode
  4254→        const textarea = afterEl.querySelector('textarea');
  4255→        if (textarea) {
  4256→          const txt = textarea.value;
  4257→          afterEl.innerHTML = `<span id="rw-after-text-${id}">${escapeHtml(txt)}</span>`;
  4258→        }
  4259→        // Re-show the inline diff panel; hide the edit area.
  4260→        if (diffEl) diffEl.style.display = '';
  4261→        afterEl.style.display = 'none';
  4262→
  4263→        rewriteDecisions[id] = { outcome, final_text: null };
  4264→        card.classList.add(outcome === 'accept' ? 'accepted' : 'rejected');
  4265→        document.getElementById(`rw-${outcome}-${id}`)?.classList.add('active');
  4266→        updateRewriteTally();
  4267→      }
  4268→    }
  4269→
  4270→    function saveRewriteEdit(id) {
  4271→      const textarea   = document.getElementById(`rw-textarea-${id}`);
  4272→      const editedText = textarea ? textarea.value : '';
  4273→      const afterEl    = document.getElementById(`rw-after-${id}`);
  4274→      const diffEl     = document.getElementById(`rw-diff-${id}`);
  4275→      const card       = document.getElementById(`rw-card-${id}`);
  4276→      if (!afterEl || !card) return;
  4277→
  4278→      // Replace textarea with final span (hidden — preserves text for future edits).
  4279→      afterEl.innerHTML = `<span id="rw-after-text-${id}">${escapeHtml(editedText)}</span>`;
  4280→      afterEl.style.display = 'none';
  4281→
  4282→      // Regenerate the inline diff against the original text and re-show it.
  4283→      if (diffEl) {
  4284→        const original = diffEl.dataset.original || '';
  4285→        diffEl.innerHTML = renderDiffHtml(computeWordDiff(original, editedText));
  4286→        diffEl.style.display = '';
  4287→      }
  4288→
  4289→      rewriteDecisions[id] = { outcome: 'edit', final_text: editedText };
  4290→      card.classList.remove('rejected');
  4291→      card.classList.add('accepted');
  4292→      ['accept', 'reject'].forEach(a => document.getElementById(`rw-${a}-${id}`)?.classList.remove('active'));
  4293→      document.getElementById(`rw-edit-${id}`)?.classList.add('active');
  4294→      updateRewriteTally();
  4295→    }
  4296→
  4297→    function updateRewriteTally() {
  4298→      const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.rewrite-card');
  4299→      let accepted = 0, rejected = 0, pending = 0;
  4300→      cards.forEach(card => {
  4301→        const id  = card.id.replace('rw-card-', '');
  4302→        const dec = rewriteDecisions[id];
  4303→        if      (!dec)                                           pending++;
  4304→        else if (dec.outcome === 'accept' || dec.outcome === 'edit') accepted++;
  4305→        else                                                     rejected++;
  4306→      });
  4307→
  4308→      document.getElementById('tally-accepted').textContent = accepted;
  4309→      document.getElementById('tally-rejected').textContent = rejected;
  4310→      document.getElementById('tally-pending').textContent  = pending;
  4311→
  4312→      const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submit-rewrites-btn');
  4313→      if (submitBtn) submitBtn.disabled = (pending > 0);
  4314→    }
  4315→
  4316→    async function submitRewriteDecisions() {
  4317→      const decisions = Object.entries(rewriteDecisions).map(([id, dec]) => ({
  4318→        id,
  4319→        outcome:    dec.outcome,
  4320→        final_text: dec.final_text ?? null
  4321→      }));
  4322→
  4323→      const loadingMsg = appendLoadingMessage('Submitting rewrite decisions...');
  4324→      setLoading(true);
  4325→      try {
  4326→        const res = await fetch('/api/rewrites/approve', {
  4327→          method: 'POST',
  4328→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  4329→          body: JSON.stringify({ decisions })
  4330→        });
  4331→        const data = await res.json();
  4332→        removeLoadingMessage(loadingMsg);
  4333→        setLoading(false);
  4334→
  4335→        if (!res.ok) {
  4336→          appendMessage('system', 'Error: ' + (data.error || 'Failed to submit rewrite decisions'));
  4337→          return;
  4338→        }
  4339→
  4340→        const accepted = data.approved_count || 0;
  4341→        const rejected = data.rejected_count || 0;
  4342→        appendMessage('assistant', `✅ Rewrite decisions recorded: ${accepted} accepted, ${rejected} rejected. Starting spell check…`);
  4343→        switchTab('spell');
  4344→      } catch (err) {
  4345→        removeLoadingMessage(loadingMsg);
  4346→        setLoading(false);
  4347→        appendMessage('system', 'Error: ' + err.message);
  4348→      }
  4349→    }
  4350→
  4351→    // ==== End Rewrite Review Functions ====
  4352→
  4353→    // ==== Spell Check Functions ====
  4354→
  4355→    // Audit log for the current spell-check session: [{context_type, location, original, suggestion, rule, outcome, final}]
  4356→    let spellAudit = [];
  4357→
  4358→    async function populateSpellCheckTab() {
  4359→      const content = document.getElementById('document-content');
  4360→      content.innerHTML = `
  4361→        <h1>🔤 Spell &amp; Grammar Check</h1>
  4362→        <p style="color:#6b7280;margin-bottom:24px;">Checking CV sections for spelling and grammar issues…</p>
  4363→        <div id="spell-loading" style="text-align:center;padding:40px;">
  4364→          <div class="loading-spinner"></div>
  4365→          <p style="color:#6b7280;margin-top:12px;">Running LanguageTool checks…</p>
  4366→        </div>
  4367→        <div id="spell-results" style="display:none;"></div>
  4368→      `;
  4369→      spellAudit = [];
  4370→
  4371→      try {
  4372→        // Fetch sections to check
  4373→        const sectionsRes = await fetch('/api/spell-check-sections');
  4374→        const sectionsData = await sectionsRes.json();
  4375→        if (!sectionsData.ok) {
  4376→          document.getElementById('spell-loading').innerHTML = `<p class="error-message">Failed to load sections: ${sectionsData.error || 'Unknown error'}</p>`;
  4377→          return;
  4378→        }
  4379→
  4380→        const sections = sectionsData.sections || [];
  4381→        if (sections.length === 0) {
  4382→          // Fast-path: no sections to check — advance phase immediately
  4383→          await completeSpellCheckFastPath('No CV sections available to check.');
  4384→          return;
  4385→        }
  4386→
  4387→        // Check each section
  4388→        const flaggedSections = [];
  4389→        for (const section of sections) {
  4390→          const res  = await fetch('/api/spell-check', {
  4391→            method: 'POST',
  4392→            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  4393→            body: JSON.stringify({ text: section.text, context: section.context })
  4394→          });
  4395→          const data = await res.json();
  4396→          if (data.ok && data.suggestions && data.suggestions.length > 0) {
  4397→            flaggedSections.push({ section, suggestions: data.suggestions });
  4398→          }
  4399→        }
  4400→
  4401→        document.getElementById('spell-loading').style.display = 'none';
  4402→
  4403→        if (flaggedSections.length === 0) {
  4404→          // Zero-flag fast-path
  4405→          await completeSpellCheckFastPath(`Spell check passed — ${sections.length} section${sections.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} checked, no issues found.`);
  4406→          return;
  4407→        }
  4408→
  4409→        // Render suggestions panel
  4410→        renderSpellSuggestions(flaggedSections, sections.length);
  4411→
  4412→      } catch (err) {
  4413→        console.error('Spell check error:', err);
  4414→        document.getElementById('spell-loading').innerHTML = `<p style="color:#ef4444;padding:20px;">Spell check failed: ${err.message}</p>`;
  4415→      }
  4416→    }
  4417→
  4418→    async function completeSpellCheckFastPath(message) {
  4419→      // Save empty audit and advance to generation
  4420→      const res  = await fetch('/api/spell-check-complete', {
  4421→        method: 'POST',
  4422→        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  4423→        body: JSON.stringify({ spell_audit: [] })
  4424→      });
  4425→      const data = await res.json();
  4426→      const content = document.getElementById('document-content');
  4427→      content.innerHTML = `
  4428→        <div style="text-align:center;padding:60px 20px;">
  4429→          <div style="font-size:3em;margin-bottom:16px;">✅</div>
  4430→          <h2 style="color:#166534;">${message}</h2>
  4431→          <p style="color:#6b7280;margin:16px 0 24px;">Advancing to CV generation…</p>
  4432→        </div>
  4433→      `;
  4434→      // Refresh status then navigate to CV tab and generate
  4435→      await fetchStatus();
  4436→      await sendAction('generate_cv');
  4437→    }
  4438→
  4439→    function renderSpellSuggestions(flaggedSections, totalSections) {
  4440→      const results = document.getElementById('spell-results');
  4441→      results.style.display = '';
  4442→
  4443→      let html = `
  4444→        <div style="background:#fef9c3;border:1px solid #fde047;border-radius:8px;padding:12px 16px;margin-bottom:24px;">
  4445→          <strong>⚠ ${flaggedSections.reduce((t, f) => t + f.suggestions.length, 0)} issue${flaggedSections.reduce((t, f) => t + f.suggestions.length, 0) !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</strong> found
  4446→          across ${flaggedSections.length} of ${totalSections} section${totalSections !== 1 ? 's' : ''}.
  4447→          Review each suggestion below, then click <strong>Done</strong>.
  4448→        </div>
  4449→      `;
  4450→
  4451→      flaggedSections.forEach(({ section, suggestions }) => {
  4452→        html += `<div class="review-section" style="margin-bottom:24px;">
  4453→          <h3 style="font-size:1em;font-weight:700;color:#374151;margin-bottom:12px;">${escapeHtml(section.label)}</h3>
  4454→          <div style="background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:10px;font-size:0.9em;white-space:pre-wrap;">${escapeHtml(section.text)}</div>
  4455→        `;
  4456→        suggestions.forEach((sug, idx) => {
  4457→          const sugId = `sug_${section.id}_${idx}`;
  4458→          const reps = sug.replacements || [];
  4459→          html += `
  4460→            <div class="spell-suggestion" id="${sugId}" data-section-id="${escapeHtml(section.id)}" data-idx="${idx}"
  4461→                 style="border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:8px;background:#fff;">
  4462→              <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;">
  4463→                <div style="flex:1;">
  4464→                  <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:#6b7280;margin-bottom:4px;">
  4465→                    <span style="background:#fee2e2;color:#dc2626;border-radius:4px;padding:1px 6px;font-weight:600;">${escapeHtml(sug.flagged)}</span>
  4466→                    <span style="margin-left:8px;">${escapeHtml(sug.message)}</span>
  4467→                  </div>
  4468→                  <div style="font-style:italic;font-size:0.85em;color:#374151;margin-bottom:8px;">${escapeHtml(sug.snippet)}</div>
  4469→                  ${reps.length > 0 ? `
  4470→                  <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
  4471→                    <span style="font-size:0.82em;color:#6b7280;align-self:center;">Suggestions:</span>
  4472→                    ${reps.map((r, ri) => `<button class="rewrite-keyword" onclick="applySpellReplacement('${escapeHtml(section.id)}', ${idx}, ${ri})"
  4473→                      style="cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #3b82f6;background:#dbeafe;">${escapeHtml(r)}</button>`).join('')}
  4474→                  </div>` : ''}
  4475→                  <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
  4476→                    <button class="icon-btn" onclick="dismissSpellSuggestion('${escapeHtml(sugId)}', '${escapeHtml(section.id)}', ${idx}, '${escapeHtml(sug.flagged)}')"
  4477→                        title="Ignore this suggestion">Ignore</button>
  4478→                    <button class="icon-btn" onclick="addSpellWord('${escapeHtml(sug.flagged)}', '${escapeHtml(sugId)}')"
  4479→                        title="Add to custom dictionary">Add to Dictionary</button>
  4480→                  </div>
  4481→                </div>
  4482→              </div>
  4483→            </div>
  4484→          `;
  4485→          // Register in audit as pending
  4486→          if (!window._spellSugMap) window._spellSugMap = {};
  4487→          window._spellSugMap[`${section.id}_${idx}`] = {
  4488→            context_type: section.context,
  4489→            location:     section.label,
  4490→            original:     sug.flagged,
  4491→            suggestion:   (reps[0] || ''),
  4492→            rule:         sug.rule_id || '',
  4493→            outcome:      'pending',
  4494→            final:        sug.flagged,
  4495→          };
  4496→        });
  4497→        html += '</div>';
  4498→      });
  4499→
  4500→      html += `
  4501→        <div class="nav-buttons" style="margin:24px 0;">
  4502→          <button class="submit-btn" onclick="submitSpellCheckDecisions()">Done — Generate CV</button>
  4503→        </div>
  4504→      `;
  4505→      results.innerHTML = html;
  4506→    }
  4507→
  4508→    function applySpellReplacement(sectionId, idx, repIdx) {
  4509→      const key  = `${sectionId}_${idx}`;
  4510→      const entry = (window._spellSugMap || {})[key];
  4511→      if (!entry) return;
  4512→      // The replacements list is not directly accessible here — read from DOM suggestion
  4513→      const sugEl = document.querySelector(`.spell-suggestion[data-section-id="${CSS.escape(sectionId)}"][data-idx="${idx}"]`);
  4514→      if (!sugEl) return;
  4515→      const buttons = sugEl.querySelectorAll('.rewrite-keyword');
  4516→      const rep = buttons[repIdx] ? buttons[repIdx].textContent.trim() : '';
  4517→      entry.outcome = 'accept';
  4518→      entry.final   = rep;
  4519→      // Visual feedback: strike the flagged word, show replacement
  4520→      const flaggedSpan = sugEl.querySelector('span[style*="background:#fee2e2"]');
  4521→      if (flaggedSpan) {
  4522→        flaggedSpan.outerHTML = `<del style="color:#dc2626;">${escapeHtml(entry.original)}</del> → <ins style="color:#166534;text-decoration:none;">${escapeHtml(rep)}</ins>`;
  4523→      }
  4524→      sugEl.style.opacity = '0.5';
  4525→    }
  4526→
  4527→    function dismissSpellSuggestion(sugId, sectionId, idx, word) {
  4528→      const key   = `${sectionId}_${idx}`;
  4529→      const entry = (window._spellSugMap || {})[key];
  4530→      if (entry) { entry.outcome = 'reject'; entry.final = word; }
  4531→      const el = document.getElementById(sugId);
  4532→      if (el) el.style.opacity = '0.4';
  4533→    }
  4534→
  4535→    async function addSpellWord(word, sugId) {
  4536→      try {
  4537→        const res = await fetch('/api/custom-dictionary', {
  4538→          method: 'POST',
  4539→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  4540→          body: JSON.stringify({ word })
  4541→        });
  4542→        const data = await res.json();
  4543→        if (data.ok) {
  4544→          const el = document.getElementById(sugId);
  4545→          if (el) {
  4546→            el.style.opacity = '0.4';
  4547→            const msg = document.createElement('div');
  4548→            msg.style.cssText = 'color:#166534;font-size:0.85em;margin-top:4px;';
  4549→            msg.textContent = `"${word}" added to dictionary.`;
  4550→            el.appendChild(msg);
  4551→          }
  4552→          // Also record in audit
  4553→          const parts = sugId.replace(/^sug_/, '').split('_');
  4554→          const idx = parseInt(parts.pop(), 10);
  4555→          const sectionId = parts.join('_');
  4556→          const key = `${sectionId}_${idx}`;
  4557→          const entry = (window._spellSugMap || {})[key];
  4558→          if (entry) { entry.outcome = 'add_dict'; entry.final = word; }
  4559→        }
  4560→      } catch (err) {
  4561→        console.error('Error adding to dictionary:', err);
  4562→      }
  4563→    }
  4564→
  4565→    async function submitSpellCheckDecisions() {
  4566→      // Collect audit from _spellSugMap
  4567→      const audit = Object.values(window._spellSugMap || {}).filter(e => e.outcome !== 'pending');
  4568→      // Remaining 'pending' items are implicitly accepted as-is
  4569→      Object.values(window._spellSugMap || {}).forEach(e => {
  4570→        if (e.outcome === 'pending') { e.outcome = 'ignore'; audit.push(e); }
  4571→      });
  4572→      spellAudit = audit;
  4573→
  4574→      const loadingMsg = appendLoadingMessage('Saving spell check decisions…');
  4575→      setLoading(true);
  4576→      try {
  4577→        const res  = await fetch('/api/spell-check-complete', {
  4578→          method: 'POST',
  4579→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  4580→          body: JSON.stringify({ spell_audit: spellAudit })
  4581→        });
  4582→        const data = await res.json();
  4583→        removeLoadingMessage(loadingMsg);
  4584→        setLoading(false);
  4585→        if (!res.ok) {
  4586→          showAlertModal('❌ Error', `Failed to save spell check: ${data.error || 'Unknown error'}`);
  4587→          return;
  4588→        }
  4589→        appendMessage('assistant', `✅ Spell check complete — ${spellAudit.length} item${spellAudit.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} reviewed. Generating your CV…`);
  4590→        await fetchStatus();
  4591→        await sendAction('generate_cv');
  4592→      } catch (err) {
  4593→        removeLoadingMessage(loadingMsg);
  4594→        setLoading(false);
  4595→        showAlertModal('❌ Error', `Spell check error: ${err.message}`);
  4596→      }
  4597→    }
  4598→
  4599→    // ==== End Spell Check Functions ====
  4600→
  4601→    async function fetchWithRetry(url, options = {}, maxRetries = 3) {
  4602→      for (let i = 0; i < maxRetries; i++) {
  4603→        try {
  4604→          const response = await fetch(url, options);
  4605→          if (response.ok) {
  4606→            return response;
  4607→          }
  4608→          throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}: ${response.statusText}`);
  4609→        } catch (error) {
  4610→          console.warn(`Attempt ${i + 1} failed:`, error);
  4611→          if (i === maxRetries - 1) {
  4612→            throw error;
  4613→          }
  4614→          // Wait before retry (exponential backoff)
  4615→          await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, Math.pow(2, i) * 1000));
  4616→        }
  4617→      }
  4618→    }
  4619→    
  4620→    async function sendAction(action) {
  4621→      if (isLoading) return;
  4622→      
  4623→      const loadingMsg = appendLoadingMessage(`Executing ${action}...`);
  4624→      setLoading(true);
  4625→      
  4626→      try {
  4627→        // Include user preferences if available and action is recommend_customizations
  4628→        const payload = { action };
  4629→        if (action === 'recommend_customizations' && window.questionAnswers) {
  4630→          payload.user_preferences = window.questionAnswers;
  4631→        }
  4632→        
  4633→        const res = await fetch('/api/action', {
  4634→          method: 'POST',
  4635→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },

  4637→        });
  4638→        const data = await res.json();

  4666→        appendMessage('system', 'Error: ' + error.message);

  4668→      
  4669→      setLoading(false);
  4670→      await fetchStatus();

  4708→    function appendLoadingMessage(text) {

  4721→    function removeLoadingMessage(messageElement) {

  4725→    }
  4726→
  4727→    function appendMessage(type, text) {
  4728→      const conversation = document.getElementById('conversation');
  4729→      const message = document.createElement('div');
  4730→      message.className = `message ${type}`;
  4731→      const content = document.createElement('div');
  4732→      content.className = 'content';
  4733→      
  4734→      // Simple markdown rendering: convert **text** to <strong> and preserve newlines
  4735→      let html = text
  4736→        .replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')  // Bold
  4737→        .replace(/\*(.+?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')              // Italic
  4738→        .replace(/\n/g, '<br>');                           // Newlines
  4739→      
  4740→      content.innerHTML = html;
  4741→      message.appendChild(content);
  4742→      
  4743→      // Check if message ends with response options like (yes/no/maybe)
  4744→      const optionsMatch = text.match(/\(([^)]+\/[^)]+)\)\s*$/);  // Match (option1/option2/option3)
  4745→      if (optionsMatch && type === 'assistant') {
  4746→        const options = optionsMatch[1].split('/').map(opt => opt.trim());
  4747→        const buttonContainer = document.createElement('div');
  4748→        buttonContainer.style.cssText = 'margin-top: 12px; display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap;';
  4749→        
  4750→        options.forEach(option => {
  4751→          const btn = document.createElement('button');
  4752→          btn.textContent = option;
  4753→          btn.className = 'action-btn';
  4754→          btn.style.cssText = 'padding: 8px 16px; background: #3b82f6; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer;';
  4755→          btn.onclick = () => {
  4756→            document.getElementById('message-input').value = option;
  4757→            sendMessage();
  4758→          };
  4759→          buttonContainer.appendChild(btn);
  4760→        });
  4761→        
  4762→        message.appendChild(buttonContainer);
  4763→      }
  4764→      
  4765→      conversation.appendChild(message);
  4766→      conversation.scrollTop = conversation.scrollHeight;
  4767→    }

  4838→    function setLoading(loading, label) {
  4839→      isLoading = loading;
  4840→      const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('button');
  4841→      buttons.forEach(btn => btn.disabled = loading);
  4842→
  4843→      // Progress bar
  4844→      let bar = document.getElementById('loading-progress-bar');
  4845→      if (loading) {
  4846→        if (!bar) {
  4847→          bar = document.createElement('div');
  4848→          bar.id = 'loading-progress-bar';
  4849→          document.body.prepend(bar);
  4850→        }
  4851→        // Animate to 70% to indicate in-progress (completing in fetchStatus)
  4852→        requestAnimationFrame(() => { bar.style.width = '70%'; });
  4853→        if (label) bar.title = label;
  4854→      } else {
  4855→        if (bar) {
  4856→          bar.style.width = '100%';
  4857→          setTimeout(() => bar.remove(), 400);
  4858→        }
  4859→      }
  4860→
  4861→      // Pulse the active workflow step

  4863→        el.classList.toggle('loading-step', loading);

  4867→    function extractTitleAndCompanyFromJobText(jobText) {
  4868→      if (!jobText || typeof jobText !== 'string') {
  4869→        return { title: '', company: '' };
  4870→      }
  4871→
  4872→      const lines = jobText
  4873→        .split('\n')
  4874→        .map(line => line.trim())
  4875→        .filter(Boolean);
  4876→
  4877→      if (lines.length === 0) {
  4878→        return { title: '', company: '' };
  4879→      }
  4880→
  4881→      const firstLine = lines[0] || '';
  4882→      const secondLine = lines[1] || '';
  4883→      const atMatch = firstLine.match(/^(.+?)\s+at\s+(.+)$/i);
  4884→
  4885→      if (atMatch) {
  4886→        return {
  4887→          title: atMatch[1].trim(),
  4888→          company: atMatch[2].trim()
  4889→        };
  4890→      }
  4891→
  4892→      return {
  4893→        title: firstLine,
  4894→        company: secondLine
  4895→      };
  4896→    }
  4897→
  4898→    function normalizePositionLabel(title, company) {
  4899→      const cleanTitle = (title || '').toString().trim();
  4900→      const cleanCompany = (company || '').toString().trim();
  4901→
  4902→      if (cleanTitle && cleanCompany) {
  4903→        return `${cleanTitle} at ${cleanCompany}`;
  4904→      }
  4905→      return cleanTitle || cleanCompany || '';
  4906→    }
  4907→
  4908→    function updatePositionTitle(status = {}) {
  4909→      const positionEl = document.getElementById('position-title');

  4911→
  4912→      const fallbackBrowserTitle = 'CV Generator — Professional Web UI';

  4915→      if (!label && status.job_analysis) {
  4916→        try {
  4917→          const analysis = typeof status.job_analysis === 'string'
  4918→            ? JSON.parse(cleanJsonResponse(status.job_analysis))
  4919→            : status.job_analysis;
  4920→          label = normalizePositionLabel(analysis?.title, analysis?.company);
  4921→        } catch (error) {

  4925→

  4928→        label = normalizePositionLabel(parsed.title, parsed.company);
  4929→      }
  4930→
  4931→      positionEl.textContent = label;
  4932→      document.title = label ? `${label} — AI CV Customizer` : fallbackBrowserTitle;

  4984→    async function openCopilotAuthModal() {
  4985→      // If already authenticated, let user log out instead
  4986→      const statusRes = await fetch('/api/copilot-auth/status').then(r => r.json()).catch(() => ({}));
  4987→      if (statusRes.authenticated) {
  4988→        if (confirm('You are already authenticated with GitHub Copilot. Log out?')) {
  4989→          await fetch('/api/copilot-auth/logout', { method: 'POST' });
  4990→          updateAuthBadge({ authenticated: false });
  4991→        }
  4992→        return;
  4993→      }
  4994→
  4995→      // Start device flow
  4996→      const flowRes = await fetch('/api/copilot-auth/start', { method: 'POST' });
  4997→      if (!flowRes.ok) {
  4998→        alert('Failed to start auth flow: ' + (await flowRes.text()));
  4999→        return;
  5000→      }
  5001→      const flow = await flowRes.json();
  5002→
  5003→      // Show modal
  5004→      document.getElementById('auth-user-code').textContent   = flow.user_code;
  5005→      document.getElementById('auth-verify-link').href         = flow.verification_uri || 'https://github.com/login/device';
  5006→      document.getElementById('auth-verify-link').textContent  = flow.verification_uri || 'github.com/login/device';
  5007→      document.getElementById('auth-status-msg').textContent   = 'Waiting for you to enter the code at GitHub…';
  5008→      document.getElementById('auth-modal-overlay').classList.add('visible');
  5009→
  5010→      // Kick off server-side polling
  5011→      await fetch('/api/copilot-auth/poll', { method: 'POST' });
  5012→      updateAuthBadge({ authenticated: false, polling: true });
  5013→
  5014→      // Client-side status polling
  5015→      _authPollTimer = setInterval(async () => {
  5016→        const st = await fetch('/api/copilot-auth/status').then(r => r.json()).catch(() => ({}));
  5017→        updateAuthBadge(st);
  5018→        if (st.authenticated) {
  5019→          clearInterval(_authPollTimer);
  5020→          document.getElementById('auth-status-msg').textContent = '\u2713 Authenticated! Closing…';
  5021→          document.getElementById('auth-open-btn').disabled = true;
  5022→          setTimeout(closeCopilotAuthModal, 1200);
  5023→        } else if (st.error) {
  5024→          clearInterval(_authPollTimer);
  5025→          document.getElementById('auth-status-msg').textContent = '\u274C ' + st.error;
  5026→          updateAuthBadge({ authenticated: false });
  5027→        }
  5028→      }, 5000);
  5029→    }

  5041→    // ==== Phase Re-entry / Iterative Refinement ====

  5043→    /**
  5044→     * Navigate back to a prior workflow step without clearing downstream state.
  5045→     * Called by "Refine" buttons in Download tab and ↻ workflow-step icons.
  5046→     */
  5047→    async function backToPhase(step) {
  5048→      try {
  5049→        const res  = await fetch('/api/back-to-phase', {
  5050→          method: 'POST',
  5051→          headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
  5052→          body: JSON.stringify({phase: step}),
  5053→        });
  5054→        const data = await res.json();
  5055→        if (!res.ok || !data.ok) {
  5056→          appendMessage('system', '⚠ Could not navigate back: ' + (data.error || 'Unknown error'));
  5057→          return;
  5058→        }
  5059→        appendMessage('assistant', `↻ Navigating back to ${step}. Prior decisions and approvals are preserved.`);
  5060→        await fetchStatus();
  5061→
  5062→        // Switch to the appropriate viewer tab
  5063→        const tabMap = {
  5064→          job:            null,
  5065→          analysis:       'analysis',
  5066→          customizations: 'customizations',
  5067→          rewrite:        'rewrite',
  5068→          spell:          'spell',
  5069→          generate:       'cv',
  5070→        };
  5071→        const resolvedTab = tabMap[step] || tabMap[data.phase] || null;
  5072→        if (resolvedTab) switchTab(resolvedTab);
  5073→      } catch (err) {
  5074→        appendMessage('system', '⚠ Network error in backToPhase: ' + err.message);
  5075→      }
  5076→    }
  5077→
  5078→    /**
  5079→     * Re-run the LLM call for a phase with downstream context included.
  5080→     * Shows a confirmation popover before proceeding.
  5081→     */
  5082→    function confirmReRunPhase(step) {
  5083→      const label = {
  5084→        analysis:       'Job Analysis',
  5085→        customizations: 'Customisations',
  5086→        rewrite:        'Rewrite Review',
  5087→      }[step] || step;
  5088→
  5089→      if (!confirm(
  5090→        `Re-run ${label} using updated inputs?\n\n` +
  5091→        `Prior approvals will be preserved and included as context.`
  5092→      )) return;
  5093→
  5094→      reRunPhase(step);
  5095→    }
  5096→
  5097→    async function reRunPhase(step) {
  5098→      const loadingMsg = appendLoadingMessage(`↻ Re-running ${step}…`);
  5099→      setLoading(true);
  5100→      try {
  5101→        const res  = await fetch('/api/re-run-phase', {
  5102→          method: 'POST',
  5103→          headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
  5104→          body: JSON.stringify({phase: step}),
  5105→        });
  5106→        const data = await res.json();
  5107→        removeLoadingMessage(loadingMsg);
  5108→        setLoading(false);
  5109→
  5110→        if (!res.ok || !data.ok) {
  5111→          appendMessage('system', '⚠ Re-run failed: ' + (data.error || 'Unknown error'));
  5112→          return;
  5113→        }
  5114→
  5115→        appendMessage('assistant', `✅ ${step} re-run complete. Review the updated results — changed items are highlighted.`);
  5116→        await fetchStatus();
  5117→
  5118→        // Navigate to the step's viewer tab
  5119→        const tabMap = {
  5120→          analysis:       'analysis',
  5121→          customizations: 'customizations',
  5122→          rewrite:        'rewrite',
  5123→        };
  5124→        if (tabMap[step]) switchTab(tabMap[step]);
  5125→
  5126→      } catch (err) {
  5127→        removeLoadingMessage(loadingMsg);
  5128→        setLoading(false);
  5129→        appendMessage('system', '⚠ Network error in reRunPhase: ' + err.message);
  5130→      }
  5131→    }

  5233→    async function saveBulletOrder(expId) {

  5242→        const data = await res.json();

  5274→    function updateWorkflowSteps(status) {
  5275→      // 8-step workflow bar: Job Input → Analysis → Customise → Rewrites →
  5276→      //                      Spell Check → Generate → Layout (upcoming) → Finalise
  5277→      //
  5278→      // 'upcoming' steps (layout) are not yet implemented.

  5280→
  5281→      // Steps that support LLM re-execution via /api/re-run-phase
  5282→      const RE_RUN_STEPS = new Set(['analysis', 'customizations', 'rewrite']);
  5283→
  5284→      // Base label for each step (used when injecting ↻ button)
  5285→      const STEP_LABELS = {
  5286→        job:            '📥 Job Input',
  5287→        analysis:       '🔍 Analysis',
  5288→        customizations: '⚙️ Customise',
  5289→        rewrite:        '✏️ Rewrites',
  5290→        spell:          '🔤 Spell Check',
  5291→        generate:       '📄 Generate',
  5292→        finalise:       '✅ Finalise',
  5293→      };
  5294→
  5295→      // Determine which steps are done based on session state fields.
  5296→      const phase = status.phase || '';
  5297→      const done = {
  5298→        job:            !!status.job_description,
  5299→        analysis:       !!status.job_analysis,
  5300→        customizations: !!status.customizations,
  5301→        rewrite:        phase !== 'rewrite_review' && (!!status.customizations),
  5302→        spell:          phase === 'generation' || phase === 'refinement',
  5303→        generate:       !!status.generated_files,
  5304→        finalise:       phase === 'refinement' && !!status.generated_files,
  5305→      };
  5306→
  5307→      // Determine the active step from the backend phase string.
  5308→      const phaseToStep = {
  5309→        'init':          'job',
  5310→        'job_analysis':  'analysis',
  5311→        'customization': 'customizations',
  5312→        'rewrite_review':'rewrite',
  5313→        'spell_check':   'spell',
  5314→        'generation':    'generate',
  5315→        'refinement':    'finalise',
  5316→      };
  5317→      const activeStep = phaseToStep[phase] || 'job';
  5318→
  5319→      // Resolve the reentry step for the "Refining" badge
  5320→      const _phaseToStep2 = Object.assign({'init': 'job'}, phaseToStep);
  5321→      const reentryStep = status.iterating
  5322→        ? (_phaseToStep2[status.reentry_phase] || status.reentry_phase || null)
  5323→        : null;
  5324→
  5325→      const stepIds = ['job', 'analysis', 'customizations', 'rewrite', 'spell', 'generate', 'layout', 'finalise'];
  5326→      stepIds.forEach(step => {
  5327→        const el = document.getElementById(`step-${step}`);
  5328→        if (!el) return;
  5329→        // Upcoming steps are fixed — never change their class.
  5330→        if (UPCOMING.has(step)) return;
  5331→        el.classList.remove('active', 'completed', 'clickable', 'upcoming');
  5332→
  5333→        let label = STEP_LABELS[step] || step;
  5334→
  5335→        if (step === activeStep) {
  5336→          el.classList.add('active');
  5337→          // "↻ Refining" badge shown on the active step when iterating
  5338→          if (status.iterating && reentryStep === step) {
  5339→            label += ' <span style="font-size:0.75em;background:#fef9c3;color:#92400e;' +
  5340→                     'border-radius:6px;padding:1px 5px;vertical-align:middle;">↻ Refining</span>';
  5341→          }
  5342→        } else if (done[step]) {
  5343→          el.classList.add('completed');
  5344→          // Completed steps are clickable for back-navigation.
  5345→          el.classList.add('clickable');
  5346→          // Add ↻ re-run icon for steps that support LLM re-execution
  5347→          if (RE_RUN_STEPS.has(step)) {
  5348→            label += ` <span class="step-rerun" title="Re-run ${step} with updated inputs"
  5349→              onclick="event.stopPropagation();confirmReRunPhase('${step}')"
  5350→              style="font-size:0.8em;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.15s;margin-left:2px;cursor:pointer;">↻</span>`;
  5351→          }
  5352→        }
  5353→
  5354→        el.innerHTML = label;
  5355→      });
  5356→
  5357→      // Show ↻ icons via CSS :hover on the parent .completed step

  5359→      if (!document.getElementById('step-rerun-style')) {
  5360→        const s = document.createElement('style');
  5361→        s.id = 'step-rerun-style';
  5362→        s.textContent = '.step.completed:hover .step-rerun { opacity: 1 !important; }';
  5363→        document.head.appendChild(s);

# CV Builder UI Review
**Date:** 2026-03-11
**Source:** web/index.html
**Stories reviewed:** US-A1, US-A2, US-A3, US-A4, US-A4b, US-A5a, US-A5b, US-A5c, US-A6, US-A7, US-A8, US-A9, US-A10, US-A11, US-A12, US-U1, US-U2, US-U3, US-U4, US-U5, US-U6, US-U7, US-U8, US-U9, US-R1, US-R2, US-R3, US-R4, US-R5, US-R6, US-R7, US-M1, US-M2, US-M3, US-M4, US-M5, US-M6, US-M7, US-H1, US-H2, US-H3, US-H4, US-H5, US-H6, US-P1, US-P2, US-P3, US-P4, US-P5, US-P6

---

## Summary

| Status | Count |
|--------|-------|
| ✅ Pass | 42 |
| ⚠️ Partial | 38 |
| ❌ Fail | 4 |
| 🔲 Not Implemented | 52 |
| — N/A | 19 |

**Top gaps by severity** (criteria that are Not Implemented or Fail, grouped by story):

- **US-U1 / US-A12 / GAP-14 / GAP-18:** No workflow progress indicator exists (GAP-14); re-run affordances not visible in step indicators; back-navigation exists but only after generation — not at every completed step; session restoration does not orient user to last active step with data populated in viewer.
- **US-A5a / US-A5b / US-A5c:** HTML-first generation flow does not exist. All formats generated together from a single `generate_cv` call. No HTML-only preview step, no layout instruction field, no "Confirm Layout" / "Proceed to Final Generation" button split.
- **US-A7 / US-A8 / US-A9 / US-A10 / US-A11:** Cover letter, screening questions, Finalise/Archive, Master Data update, and Session Harvest flows are entirely absent from the UI.
- **US-U7 / GAP-15:** No accessibility baseline: `outline: none` not present globally, but ARIA labels absent on icon-only buttons; modal focus management missing; colour-only status indicators (accept = green active, reject = red active) lack text equivalents.
- **US-H6 / GAP-04:** ATS validation report is implemented for DOCX checks but the 16-check spec is not fully met; HTML JSON-LD checks are absent from the UI panel; PDF checks partially present.
- **US-P3 / US-P4 / US-P5 / US-P6:** Most persuasion QC criteria are backend concerns but the word-count enforcement, "I" opener rejection, and passive-voice flag UI are absent.
- **US-U9:** HTML Layout Review step (layout instructions field, instruction history, "Proceed to Final Generation" button) is entirely absent.

---

## US-A1: Discover and Queue a Job Opportunity

### Acceptance Criteria

| # | Criterion (abbreviated) | Status | Notes / Line refs |
|---|--------------------------|--------|-------------------|
| 1 | URL and paste-text paths both work | ✅ | Paste tab: `submitJobText()` (line 1722); URL tab: `fetchJobFromURL()` (line 1763); File tab: `uploadJobFile()` (line 1673). Three input methods. |
| 2 | Protected-site warning surfaced with manual-copy fallback | ✅ | `showProtectedSiteModal()` (line 1826) triggered when `data.protected_site` is true; shows site name, instructions, and "Paste Text" tip. |
| 3 | Company name, role title, date auto-extracted and editable | ⚠️ | Title/company are auto-extracted and displayed in `.position-bar` (line 757) via `updatePositionTitle()` (line 4908). However, there is no explicit confirmation step where the user edits these values before proceeding — they are displayed but not presented in an editable confirmation form. Date is not explicitly surfaced for confirmation. |
| 4 | Session persisted immediately after step 5 | ⚠️ | `saveTabData()` called on submit (line 1746) via localStorage; backend `/api/save` also exists. However, session is not saved with `status: "queued"` as specified — no status field is updated on job submission. |

### Failure Modes Present

| Failure mode | Present? |
|--------------|----------|
| URL and text area presented simultaneously with no hierarchy | ✅ Not present — tabs clearly separate the two modes (line 1490) |
| Protected-site shown as raw status code | ✅ Not present — `showProtectedSiteModal()` shows contextual message (line 1826) |
| Fetch takes >3 s with no spinner | ⚠️ Partial — `setLoading(true)` disables buttons (line 1772) but a visible spinner is not shown inside the URL input panel; progress bar appears at top (line 4844) |
| Correcting extracted field requires restart | ❌ Present — extracted company/title shown in position bar are read-only; no inline edit for these fields in job confirmation step |

However, mismatches are not automatically surfaced as clarifying questions — the question system (`renderQuestionsPanel`) uses LLM-generated questions from `/api/post-analysis-questions`, which may or may not include mismatch-based questions. |

| 1 | `bullet` and `skill_name` contexts don't trigger fragment warnings | — | Backend LanguageTool context filtering; not a UI concern. |
| 2 | Proper nouns in `custom_dictionary.json` produce no flags | — | Backend concern. |
| 3 | Words added via "Add to Dictionary" immediately suppressed and persisted | ✅ | `addSpellWord()` (line 4535) POSTs to `/api/custom-dictionary` and visually dims the suggestion (line 4546). |
| 4 | Editing a flag applies my text, not the LLM suggestion | — | Edit path not explicitly shown in current spell check UI; suggestions are applied via `applySpellReplacement()` (line 4508) — no inline free-text edit is offered, only suggestion buttons. |
| 5 | "Proceed to Generation" blocked while any flag remains unresolved | ⚠️ | The "Done — Generate CV" button (line 4502) is not explicitly blocked when flags remain unresolved. Any unresolved `pending` items are implicitly treated as ignored in `submitSpellCheckDecisions()` (line 4565–4570). The button is always visible and clickable. |
| 6 | Spell audit persisted in session and `metadata.json` | ✅ | `submitSpellCheckDecisions()` POSTs `spell_audit` array to `/api/spell-check-complete` (line 4577). |
| 7 | Zero-flag case completes instantly with no blocking step | ✅ | `completeSpellCheckFastPath()` (line 4418) immediately shows green banner and advances to generation. |

### Failure Modes Present

| Failure mode | Present? |
|--------------|----------|
| No free-text Edit path for spell flags | ❌ Present — `renderSpellSuggestions()` (line 4439) provides only suggestion-button replacements, Ignore, and Add to Dictionary. No inline free-text edit path exists for spell flags. |
| "Proceed" not blocked when flags unresolved | ❌ Present — "Done — Generate CV" button always enabled (line 4502); pending items are auto-dismissed on submit (line 4569). |

| No visual indication of which prior items were affected | ❌ Present — no diff highlighting after re-run (line 5115 only shows a message) |

## US-U1: Workflow Orientation and Progress Visibility

### Acceptance Criteria

| # | Criterion (abbreviated) | Status | Notes / Line refs |
|---|--------------------------|--------|-------------------|
| 1 | Step indicator present and accurate on every step view | ✅ | `.workflow-steps` with named steps rendered at lines 769–785. `updateWorkflowSteps()` (line 5274) updates active/completed/upcoming CSS classes. |
| 2 | Back navigation preserves approved content; destructive action requires confirmation | ⚠️ | Clicking completed steps calls `handleStepClick()` (line 5369) → `switchTab()` — no confirmation dialogue for potentially destructive back navigation. |
| 3 | Returning to saved session lands on last active step with data intact | ⚠️ | `restoreSession()` (line 1031) and `restoreBackendState()` (line 1091) attempt to restore tabData, but the viewer tab is not automatically switched to the last active step — user sees the Job tab unless they manually switch. |
| 4 | Stage indicator updates without page reload | ✅ | `fetchStatus()` (line 4935) called after every action and updates `updateWorkflowSteps()` (line 4952) via JS — no page reload required. |

### Failure Modes Present

| Failure mode | Present? |
|--------------|----------|
| Linear next/back buttons with no state labels | ✅ Not present — named steps exist |
| Back navigation silently discards approved content | ⚠️ Partial — back to completed tabs via `handleStepClick()` shows tab content but does not confirm destructive actions. `backToPhase()` preserves state. Two different code paths with different safety behaviours. |
| Returning to session shows blank state | ⚠️ Partial — conversation is restored, but viewer auto-switches to job description not last active step |
| Progress indicator only updates after full page reload | ✅ Not present — JS-driven updates |

## US-U7: Accessibility and Keyboard Navigation

### Acceptance Criteria

| # | Criterion (abbreviated) | Status | Notes / Line refs |
|---|--------------------------|--------|-------------------|
| 1 | All interactive elements have visible, styled focus indicator | ⚠️ | No global `outline: none` found. Custom focus styles exist for `form-input:focus` (line 269), `message-input:focus` (line 174), `q-input:focus` (line 160). Many buttons have no explicit focus style — rely on browser default, which varies. |
| 2 | Modals trap focus while open; restore focus on close | 🔲 | Auth modal (line 741), alert modal (line 849), bullet reorder modal (line 5157) do not implement focus trapping or focus restoration logic (GAP-15). |
| 3 | All icon-only controls have `aria-label` or `title` with descriptive text | ⚠️ | Experience/skill action buttons have `title` attributes (e.g., `title="Emphasize - Feature prominently with full details"`, line 3332). Rewrite action buttons have no `aria-label`. Toggle chat button (line 92) has no `aria-label`. Remove skill buttons use `title="Remove skill"` (line 3024). Partially compliant. |
| 4 | Accept/reject status communicated by both colour and text label or icon | ⚠️ | Experience/skill action buttons show colour change (green active state, line 506–512) and emoji icon (✓/✗/➕/➖). Emoji serves as both colour and icon equivalent. However, there is no explicit text label alongside the active state. |
| 5 | Tab order logical; no elements skipped | ⚠️ | Tab order follows DOM order, which appears logical. DataTables rows include interactive elements that may not be keyboard-navigable via standard tab (known DataTables limitation). |

### Failure Modes Present

| Failure mode | Present? |
|--------------|----------|
| `outline: none` globally removing focus rings | ✅ Not present — no global outline:none found |
| Modal opened without moving focus inside | ❌ Present — all modals lack focus management (GAP-15) |
| Icon-only buttons with no tooltip or ARIA label | ⚠️ Partial — most have `title` but some lack `aria-label` |
| Status only by colour (no label or icon) | ⚠️ Partial — emoji icons provide secondary signal but no explicit text state label |
| Keyboard-trapped UI or tab order skipping elements | ⚠️ Partial — DataTables rows may not be keyboard accessible |

## US-U8: Responsive Behaviour and Loading Performance

### Acceptance Criteria

| # | Criterion (abbreviated) | Status | Notes / Line refs |
|---|--------------------------|--------|-------------------|
| 1 | Core workflow navigable without horizontal scroll at 1280×800 | ⚠️ | `.main-container` uses `display: flex` with 40%/60% split (lines 62–101). Review tables use `width: 100%` (line 477). At 1280px the tables should fit, but DataTables may cause overflow if columns are too wide. No explicit responsive breakpoints defined. |
| 2 | Table columns designated as "collapsible at ≤1400px" defined in config | 🔲 | No responsive column configuration exists in DataTables initialisation (lines 3350–3356, 3461–3466). |
| 3 | Application shell renders in ≤2 s on localhost | ✅ | Shell is a single HTML file with no blocking external resources on critical path; DataTables/jQuery loaded at end of body (lines 5401–5403). |
| 4 | Async content areas have skeleton placeholders | ⚠️ | Loading spinner placeholders exist for spell check (line 4363), load job panel (line 1413), and CV editor (line 2846). Analysis, customisations, and rewrite sections do not use skeleton placeholders — they show empty-state divs. |
| 5 | Long table scroll performance acceptable | ⚠️ | DataTables with `paging: false` (lines 3350, 3461) loads all rows at once. For 30+ skill rows this may exhibit scroll jank. No virtual scrolling implemented. |

### Failure Modes Present

| Failure mode | Present? |
|--------------|----------|
| Review table overflows viewport horizontally at 1280×800 | ⚠️ Partial — no test evidence; potential overflow from fixed-width columns in experience table (lines 484–488) |
| Page blank-whites >2 s on first load | ✅ Not present — minimal blocking resources |
| Content areas collapsing to zero height on LLM arrival (CLS) | ⚠️ Partial — empty-state divs reserve some space but are replaced entirely when content arrives |
| Skills table with 30+ rows causing scroll degradation | ⚠️ Partial — no virtual scrolling; performance unverified |

# CV Builder UI Review
**Date:** 2026-03-11
**Source:** web/index.html
**Stories reviewed:** US-A1, US-A2, US-A3, US-A4, US-A4b, US-A5a, US-A5b, US-A5c, US-A6, US-A7, US-A8, US-A9, US-A10, US-A11, US-A12, US-U1, US-U2, US-U3, US-U4, US-U5, US-U6, US-U7, US-U8, US-U9, US-R1, US-R2, US-R3, US-R4, US-R5, US-R6, US-R7, US-M1, US-M2, US-M3, US-M4, US-M5, US-M6, US-M7, US-H1, US-H2, US-H3, US-H4, US-H5, US-H6, US-P1, US-P2, US-P3, US-P4, US-P5, US-P6

## Summary

| Status | Count |
|--------|-------|
| ✅ Pass | 42 |
| ⚠️ Partial | 38 |
| ❌ Fail | 4 |
| 🔲 Not Implemented | 52 |
| — N/A | 19 |

**Top gaps by severity** (criteria that are Not Implemented or Fail, grouped by story):

- **US-U9 / US-A5b:** HTML Layout Review step entirely absent — workflow chip marked `upcoming` (line 782), no instructions field, no instruction history, no "Proceed to Final Generation" button.
- **US-A5a / US-A5c:** No HTML-first generation flow. All formats produced in one `generate_cv` call. No inline HTML preview iframe. No step-labelled multi-format progress.
- **US-A7 / US-A8 / US-A9 / US-A10 / US-A11:** Cover letter, screening questions, Finalise/Archive (GAP-03), Master Data NL update (GAP-01), and Session Harvest flows entirely absent from the UI.
- **US-U1 / US-A12 / GAP-14 / GAP-18:** Re-run affordances only revealed on hover (not persistently visible); session restoration does not orient user to last active step in viewer; back-navigation for completed steps lacks destructive-action confirmation.
- **US-U7 / GAP-15:** Modal dialogs do not trap focus or restore focus on close. Rewrite/spell action buttons lack `aria-label`. Status distinguishable by emoji icon but no explicit text label.
- **US-U4 / GAP-16:** No bulk accept/reject controls on tables with >8 rows (skills table can have 30+ rows).
- **US-H6 / GAP-04:** ATS validation UI present but full 16-check spec coverage not guaranteed; HTML JSON-LD checks depend entirely on backend `/api/ats-validate` response.
- **US-P3 / US-P4 / GAP-17:** No CAR structure detection, no action verb list validation, no 30-word bullet compression flag — all absent from rewrite review panel; persuasion check runs post-generation only.

## US-A1: Discover and Queue a Job Opportunity

### Acceptance Criteria

| # | Criterion (abbreviated) | Status | Notes / Line refs |
|---|--------------------------|--------|-------------------|
| 1 | URL and paste-text paths both work | ✅ | Paste tab: `submitJobText()` (line 1722); URL tab: `fetchJobFromURL()` (line 1763); File upload: `uploadJobFile()` (line 1673). All three input modes present. |
| 2 | Protected-site warning surfaced with manual-copy fallback | ✅ | `showProtectedSiteModal()` (line 1826) triggered when `data.protected_site` is true; shows site name, step-by-step instructions, and "Paste Text" tab tip. |
| 3 | Company name, role title, and date auto-extracted and editable | ⚠️ | Title/company auto-extracted and displayed in `.position-title` (line 757) via `updatePositionTitle()` (line 4908). No dedicated confirmation step with inline-editable fields. Date is not surfaced for user confirmation. |
| 4 | Session persisted immediately after step 5 | ⚠️ | `saveTabData()` called on submit (line 1746) to localStorage; backend `/api/save` available. Session not saved with a `status: "queued"` field — no explicit status tracking on job submission. |

### Failure Modes Present

| Failure mode | Present? |
|--------------|----------|
| URL and text area presented simultaneously with no hierarchy | ✅ Not present — tabs clearly separate the modes (line 1490) |
| Protected-site shown as raw status code or generic error | ✅ Not present — `showProtectedSiteModal()` (line 1826) shows contextual guidance |
| Fetch takes >3 s with no spinner or progress | ⚠️ Partial — global top progress bar shown (line 4844) but no inline spinner within the URL input panel |
| Correcting extracted field requires restarting the step | ❌ Present — extracted company/title in position bar are read-only; no inline edit affordance |

### Acceptance Criteria

| # | Criterion (abbreviated) | Status | Notes / Line refs |

| 2 | Mismatch analysis run against master CV; at least one mismatch surfaced as clarifying question | ⚠️ | Mismatch callout rendered (lines 2462–2471) with `.mismatch-callout` class. Mismatches are not automatically added as clarifying questions — they surface visually but question generation depends on `/api/post-analysis-questions` LLM call which may not always include mismatch-based questions. |
| 3 | At least one clarifying question surfaced for domain/role-type ambiguity | ✅ | `buildFallbackPostAnalysisQuestions()` (line 2197) generates questions on role level, leadership vs. IC, domain focus, and company culture. |
| 4 | Clarification answers persist in session under `clarification_answers` | ⚠️ | `window.questionAnswers` sent to `/api/post-analysis-responses` (line 2247). UI key name alignment with backend `clarification_answers` is backend concern. No pre-population from prior session visible in the questions panel. |
| 5 | Clarification answers passed as context to all downstream LLM calls | — | Backend concern; `window.questionAnswers` included in `recommend_customizations` payload (line 4629). |

| 7 | Analysis results survive browser refresh | ✅ | `restoreBackendState()` (line 1091) fetches `/api/status` on reload and restores `tabData.analysis` from `statusData.job_analysis`. |

|--------------|----------|
| Full analysis as undifferentiated text block | ✅ Not present — 4+ section structured layout (lines 2451–2522) |
| Keywords listed alphabetically with no rank | ✅ Not present — `kw-badge` with `kw-rank` `#1`, `#2`… (lines 2499–2503) |
| Mismatch callouts buried below fold with no above-fold summary | ⚠️ Partial — mismatch callout rendered near top of analysis page (line 2462), no explicit above-fold guarantee for long role cards |

## US-A4: Review and Approve Text Rewrites

### Acceptance Criteria

| # | Criterion (abbreviated) | Status | Notes / Line refs |
|---|--------------------------|--------|-------------------|
| 1 | Every proposal has a visible before/after diff | ✅ | `renderRewriteCard()` (line 4179) uses `computeWordDiff()` (line 4133) + `renderDiffHtml()` (line 4171). `del.diff-removed` in red, `ins.diff-added` in green (lines 543–544). |
| 2 | Weak-evidence skill additions badged; cannot be silently accepted | ✅ | `weak-badge` ("⚠ Candidate to confirm") displayed for `evidence_strength === 'weak'` (lines 4181–4183). |
| 3 | Edited final text enters CV, not original LLM proposal | ✅ | `saveRewriteEdit()` (line 4270) stores `outcome: 'edit', final_text: editedText` (line 4289). |
| 4 | Submit blocked until all cards actioned | ✅ | `updateRewriteTally()` (line 4297) disables `submit-rewrites-btn` while `pending > 0` (line 4313). |
| 5 | Rewrite audit (proposal + outcome + final text) persisted in session | ✅ | `submitRewriteDecisions()` (line 4316) sends all decisions to `/api/rewrites/approve` with `outcome` and `final_text`. |

### Failure Modes Present

| Failure mode | Present? |
|--------------|----------|
| Side-by-side text boxes requiring cognitive comparison | ✅ Not present — inline word diff used |

| No way to edit proposed text | ✅ Not present — Edit button opens inline textarea (line 4238) |
| Rationale completely hidden unless user opens separate panel | ✅ Not present — `<details class="rewrite-rationale">` collapsible within card (lines 4211–4216) |

Not persistently visible without hover — partially fails "visible" criterion. |

| 4 | LLM re-run receives full session context including downstream decisions | — | Backend concern for `/api/re-run-phase`. |

| 7 | Session audit log records each re-run event | — | Backend concern. |

| Anti-pattern | Present? |
|--------------|----------|

| Re-run triggers only via back navigation with no way to return to current stage | ✅ Not present — re-run navigates forward after completion |
| No visual indication of which prior items were affected by the re-run | ❌ Present — no diff highlighting after re-run (only a chat message at line 5115) |
| User must re-answer all clarifying questions from scratch even when only one changed | ⚠️ Partial — answers preserved in session state, but no UI to review/amend them selectively before re-run |

## US-U1: Workflow Orientation and Progress Visibility

### Acceptance Criteria

| # | Criterion (abbreviated) | Status | Notes / Line refs |
|---|--------------------------|--------|-------------------|
| 1 | Stage indicator present and accurate on every step view; active stage unambiguous | ✅ | `.workflow-steps` with 8 named chips (lines 769–785). `updateWorkflowSteps()` (line 5274) applies `active`/`completed`/`upcoming` CSS classes after every action. |
| 2 | Back navigation preserves previously approved content; destructive action requires confirmation dialogue | ⚠️ | Clicking a completed chip calls `handleStepClick()` (line 5369) → `switchTab()` with no confirmation. `backToPhase()` (line 5047) preserves state but is only exposed in the Download tab. Two code paths with different safety behaviours. |
| 3 | Returning to a saved session lands user on last active step with data intact | ⚠️ | `restoreSession()` (line 1031) and `restoreBackendState()` (line 1091) restore conversation and tabData. Viewer tab is not automatically switched to the last active step — user is left on the Job tab unless they switch manually. |
| 4 | Stage indicator updates without requiring a page reload | ✅ | `fetchStatus()` (line 4935) called after every action; `updateWorkflowSteps()` (line 4952) updates chips via JS. |

### Failure Modes Present

| Failure mode | Present? |
|--------------|----------|
| Linear next/back buttons with no state labels | ✅ Not present — named step chips exist |
| Back navigation silently discards approved content | ⚠️ Partial — tab switching via chips is harmless (view-only), but no confirmation is shown; `backToPhase()` preserves state |
| Returning to session shows blank state instead of last-known step with data | ⚠️ Partial — conversation restored, but viewer defaults to job tab, not last active step |
| Progress indicator updates only after full page reload | ✅ Not present — JS-driven updates |

## US-U7: Accessibility and Keyboard Navigation

### Acceptance Criteria

| # | Criterion (abbreviated) | Status | Notes / Line refs |
|---|--------------------------|--------|-------------------|
| 1 | All interactive elements have a visible, styled focus indicator | ⚠️ | No global `outline: none` found. Custom focus styles on `.form-input:focus` (line 269), `message-input:focus` (line 174), `q-input:focus` (line 160). Many action buttons and icon-only controls have no explicit custom focus style — rely on browser default, which may be minimal. |
| 2 | Modals trap focus while open and restore focus to opener on close (GAP-15) | 🔲 | Auth modal (line 741), alert modal (line 849), and bullet reorder modal (line 5157) have no focus trap or focus restoration logic. |
| 3 | All icon-only controls have `aria-label` or `title` with descriptive text | ⚠️ | Experience/skill action buttons have `title` attributes (e.g., `title="Emphasize - Feature prominently with full details"`, line 3332). Rewrite action buttons (Accept/Edit/Reject, lines 4218–4220) have no `aria-label`. Toggle chat button (line 92) has no `aria-label`. Remove-skill buttons have `title="Remove skill"` (line 3024). Partially compliant. |
| 4 | Accept/reject status communicated by both colour and text label or icon | ⚠️ | Active action buttons show colour change (green, line 506) and emoji icon (✓/✗/➕/➖). Emoji provides a secondary visual signal beyond colour. No explicit text label ("Accepted"/"Rejected") alongside the active state. |
| 5 | Tab order logical and matches visual reading order; no elements skipped | ⚠️ | Tab order follows DOM order, which appears logical. DataTables dynamically generated rows may not be fully keyboard-navigable. |

### Failure Modes Present

| Failure mode | Present? |
|--------------|----------|
| `outline: none` applied globally removing focus rings | ✅ Not present |
| Modal opened without moving focus inside | ❌ Present — all modals lack focus management (GAP-15) |
| Icon-only buttons with no tooltip or ARIA label | ⚠️ Partial — most have `title` but rewrite action buttons and toggle-chat button lack `aria-label` |
| Status distinguishable only by colour | ⚠️ Partial — emoji icons provide secondary signal but no explicit text state label |
| Keyboard-trapped UI or tab order skipping elements | ⚠️ Partial — DataTables rows may not be keyboard accessible |
